- Rattan Figure: Sage Hu ｜ 藤人·瓠真人
- After going bankrupt, Kaveh entered into a period of melancholy. The Palace of Alcazarzaray had ever so briefly filled the hole in his heart that had been ripped open by so many things, but it had also proved to him once again that no matter what he gave to attain his ideals, it wasn't enough. He was now directionless, and enmeshed in a world where he could not go anywhere without Mora. And yet he was accustomed since his youth to putting on a brave front, and so Kaveh was unwilling to let his colleagues and friends know that he was nigh penniless even after selling all he owned, and so he went to a tavern, where he would order a few bottles and chat to comfort himself. One bottle later, he would collapse at the table, only to wake up in the exact same position afterward.\nLambad, the tavern owner, had reserved a seat and a few free drinks for him out of kindness, and as thanks, Kaveh helped him redesign and refit the booth seating area of the tavern's second floor. He would occasionally meet friends from his Akademiya schooling days, and with them he would pretend that he was just here to drink and gather inspiration. He would spend over a fortnight in this manner, during which he would encounter that friend that he no longer called "friend."\nWhen discussing Kaveh's old friends, the current Akademiya Scribe, Alhaitham of Haravatat, will invariably get mentioned. Alhaitham enrolled at a later date than most of those his age, but his grades stood out above the rest. People didn't know who he was or where to find him normally, only that he was some student who had gotten high marks. And when his name was mentioned, even the old researchers from Kshahrewar would shake their heads and say that he was too intelligent by half and hard to get along with.\nAt that time, Kaveh had just parted ways with his mother and was living alone. He would meet this junior student in the library at times, and would speak to him out of curiosity, and thus did he meet the Haravatat genius Alhaitham. But time would go on to prove that wishful thinking alone does not make friends. For Kaveh quickly realized that Alhaitham, though two years his junior and admittedly both extremely talented and incredibly gifted, was also utterly different from him, whether it be in personality, dealing with people, academic direction, and convictions.\nKaveh's time in school would leave him with a great many memories, the least pleasant of which is the group project they undertook together. Each recognized the other's ability, and they decided to conduct research regarding ancient structures, ancient runes, and linguistics, with Kaveh suggesting that Alhaitham be the one responsible for selecting the topic. At first, others would also take part in the cooperative project, but as the work progressed, the other students dropped out gradually as they could not keep up. That was the first time Kaveh realized the brutal and all-too-intuitive difference in talent between individuals. The Akademiya linked talent and resources to an extreme degree, and all here knew that. As Alhaitham liked to put it, certain matters have their upper limit determined by talent and their lower bound determined by hard work. Ordinary people and geniuses would be separated by various practical realities, and they did not have to force themselves to fit into a group they did not belong to. Kaveh, however, was resolute in his belief that this was all the result of obstacles that appeared during the process, and that wisdom should be uncovered by many people. To prevent the other students from backing out, Kaveh spent much time and effort helping them with their work, placing a great burden on his own shoulders. Alhaitham persisted in upholding the opposite view, believing Kaveh to be too idealistic in his ways — academia was not charity work, and temporary salvation would not change the reality of their differences in ability. Thus did discord arise between the two.\nFinally, the day came when only two people remained working on the topic: Alhaitham and Kaveh. The disputes between them accumulated to a critical mass before exploding spectacularly. Kaveh maintained that Alhaitham was too much of an egoist, that he could be much better welcomed amongst people if he would just care about helping out more often. Alhaitham for his part pointed out that Kaveh's impractical idealism was just a flight from reality, and that it would come to be a burden on his existence someday, and the source of Kaveh's altruism was naught but his inescapable sense of guilt. At that moment, more than anything else, Kaveh felt cut to the quick by someone who was his best friend. Alhaitham had seen through the reality that he had never been able to face, causing him to feel reality's bite for the first time, a feeling that made Kaveh steadfastly declare that he regretted making friends with this all-too-intelligent person.\nThe two parted ways in a single stroke. Alhaitham would remove his name from that thesis, while Kaveh would rip his copy of the thesis apart in a fury — only to put it back together with deep regret. He sensed that he would not be able to change his friend, with the reverse also being true.\nAfterwards, the two would later clash in academic journals several times, each criticizing the other's perspective. Before this, the "Decoding the Runes and Architectural Philosophy of the Ruins of King Deshret's Civilization" had made great progress. Its fruits on the linguistics front had filled various gaps in the grammatical logic of some ancient minor languages, allowing for the successful interpretation of many important texts. Similarly, the results achieved in architectural studies had successfully improved the load-bearing structures for some special terrain features in Sumeru, which greatly improved the lives of those living in remote regions. To encourage the project, the Akademiya had even specially designated a research site for its use. Unfortunately, lacking manpower and a united vision on the part of its primary researchers, it eventually ground to a halt.\nThis failed project became an unavoidable part of Kaveh's past. As the years passed, and he was beaten back by reality time and time again, Kaveh was forced to admit that his persistence born of wishful thinking was not always useful. It was only when he was rendered penniless that he finally understood the deeper meaning behind his friend's past words. A person who wished to ascend to the garden of heaven upon steps made of thin air would inevitably plant their feet on an empty stair and fall to their death. As a genius, Kaveh longed to belong in a crowd, subconsciously fearing separation from it — this was the difference between him and Alhaitham.\nReturning to the matter of that table in the tavern, Kaveh was deeply shocked to see Alhaitham, who was coincidentally present to purchase some alcohol, in this place. Alhaitham for his part could immediately tell that Kaveh was in a very bad way. Having been oppressed by life for too long, Kaveh completely unloaded all his woes onto his erstwhile friend right there and then. After all, there was nowhere to hide from his problems, so what use was concealing them in front of the one friend with whom he had fallen out so acrimoniously? He would lament about a great many misfortunes that had befallen him, only falling silent when they left the tavern in the dead of night, and his eyes fell upon a place in the distance that he once called home. Alhaitham, on the other hand, listened intently to Kaveh's words, and seeing through him once more, asked him a difficult question: "How has realizing your ideals gone for you?"\nOnly reality can force a researcher to admit that they were wrong, but Kaveh did not know what he should consider reality. He yearned for a fantasy so perfect and beautiful that none need flee it, even if the price of this dream was losing himself. He still firmly believed that his ideals were in themselves not mistaken, and that the fault lay only in the methods used to achieve them.\nPeople should not give up, for even if they are doing good in an attempt to make up for something, the results will still have meaning for some. Even if he could not enter that promised land of his ideals, that did not mean the radiance and the attraction of such a realm should be denied.\nAs for those phantasm-like realities, like how he found his homeless self living his friend's house by happenstance, or how this house, now under the Scribe's name, had been converted from that same research center the Akademiya had offered them back in the day, or how this excess academic asset would not have been turned into a residence at all after numerous transactions, had Kaveh not resolved to give it up... Or how, knowing full well that Alhaitham never did perform a good deed unconditionally, Kaveh would be plagued by guilty conscience and proactively mention helping with household chores, only to become saddled with all the domestic errands... These might be an annoyance for someone at a low point in life, but they are also proof the most unshakable part of one's past is a friend that will never change. Rationality and sensibility, language and architecture, knowledge and human feelings... Things that can never be integrated are what constitute the two sides of the mirror — indeed, of the entire world. ｜ 破产后，卡维低落了一段时间，卡萨扎莱宫短暂地填补了他心中那个被太多事物凿出的破洞，也再次向他证明：要达成理想，付出多少都不够。他找不到方向，又为没钱就寸步难行的世道所困。从小逞强惯了，卡维不愿让同学朋友知道他倾家荡产仅剩一点零钱的事，只好去酒馆点几瓶酒聊以慰藉，一瓶下肚醉倒在桌边，醒来也还在那个位置。\n酒馆主人兰巴德好心地给他留了座位和一些免费酒水，作为感谢，卡维替他重新设计布置了酒馆二楼的雅座区。偶尔在酒馆遇到教令院校友，卡维也装作只是在这里喝酒找灵感，就这样在酒馆度过了大半个月。期间，他再一次遇到了那位早就不被称作朋友的朋友。\n提到卡维的旧友，很难不说起出身知论派的现任教令院书记官艾尔海森。学生时代艾尔海森比同龄人晚入学，成绩却好得拔群。人们只知道有学生考了高分，不清楚他是谁、平时出现在哪里。而提起此人，连妙论派的老学者也会摇头，称他是过于聪明显得难以相处的天才。\n那年卡维刚经历母亲离开一事，成日生活在孤独中。他在图书馆偶遇这位学弟，出于好奇向对方搭话，就这样结识了知论派天才艾尔海森。然而时间证明，交朋友不能靠自作多情，卡维很快发现小自己两岁的艾尔海森固然极富才华与智慧，却从个性到为人处世、从学术方向到理想观念处处与他相反。\n校园时代留给卡维许多回忆，最不愉快的当数那个共同课题。他们认可对方的才能，决定成立课题以古建筑与古代符文及语言学为方向进行研究，卡维建议艾尔海森担任课题发起人。初期，组里还有其他学生参与，但随着推进，人们逐渐跟不上。那是卡维第一次意识到个体身上残酷又直观的才能差。教令院将才能和学术资源对应到了极致，人们在这里切实明白一个道理，用艾尔海森的话说：有些事情才能决定上限，而努力决定下限，普通人与天才最终会被一些现实因素区分开，不必非要融入不属于自己的群体。但那时卡维坚持认为，这些仅仅是过程中的阻碍而非结果，智慧应当由许多人一同发掘。为免其他同学退出，卡维费时费力替他们处理分内工作，把重担背在自己身上。艾尔海森则始终持相反意见，认为卡维做事过分理想化，学术不是慈善，救一时之急改变不了现实。双方由此发生分歧。\n终于有一天，课题只剩下两位参与者：艾尔海森与卡维。矛盾累积到顶峰，彻底爆发。卡维坚称艾尔海森太过自我主义，他本可以关心帮助更多人并受到更多人的欢迎，艾尔海森则指出卡维不切实际的理想主义是对现实的逃离，终有一日成为人生包袱，而根源仅仅是卡维内心无法回避的负罪感。话到这里，比起其他，卡维感受到的更多是来自最好的朋友的一针见血。艾尔海森道破了他长久以来无法面对的事实，令他第一次察觉到被现实刺中的痛楚，更令他毅然宣布非常后悔与这样一个聪明过了头的人结交为朋友。\n一拍两散，艾尔海森果断划掉其论文署名，卡维则气得撕毁了自己那份论文草稿，没过多久又后悔万分地捡起来粘好。他意识到他无法改变那位好友，反之亦然。\n日后，双方数次在学术刊物上针锋相对，驳斥对方观点。而此前，课题《赤王文明古遗迹中的符文古文字与建筑设计方向解读》就已取得巨大进展，其语言学成果成功填补了部分古文字小语种缺失的语法逻辑使得多部重要古籍得到成功解读，其建筑学成果也成功优化了须弥部分特殊地形的房屋承重结构，极大程度改善了偏远地区民生。教令院为表鼓励，特地向这一课题发放了研究所场地，可惜，人才缺失、主研究者志不同道不合…它最终停止了。\n失败的课题成了卡维人生中无法回避的往事。未来数年，一次次受到现实挫败，卡维终于承认，他一厢情愿的坚持不总是有用。直到一无所有，他才理解了过去朋友话中的深意。人想凭空登上天上花园，难免踏空台阶摔落而死。身为天才，卡维渴望群体，潜意识畏惧被远离，他与艾尔海森的区别正在此。\n回到酒馆那张桌边。多年不见，卡维对碰巧来买酒的艾尔海森出现在此深表惊奇，艾尔海森更是一眼看出他现状极差。被生活打压太久，卡维将所有烦恼统统倒了出来，反正他的问题无处遁形，无需在唯一关系破裂的朋友面前掩饰。他抱怨许多事，直到深夜走出酒馆望着远方曾是家的位置才彻底闭嘴。反倒是艾尔海森，听完他的讲述，如同又一次看透了他，问出了一个难以回答的问题：你的理想实现得如何？\n令学者承认错误的只有现实。卡维却不知哪些才是现实。他盼望美好到让人无需逃避的幻境，即便要付出自己为代价也无妨。他仍坚信理想本身并非错误，错的是他实行的手段。\n人不应该放弃，即使是为填补什么而去施善行，结果也对部分人有意义。哪怕无法抵达想象中的理想之国，亦不可否认它是那样辉煌地吸引着世人。\n至于那些犹如幻觉的现实，例如无家可归的他阴差阳错借住到旧友家里，而书记官名下房产正是由当初教令院发下的研究所转换而来，若非卡维毅然放弃，多余学术资产也不会几经合法周转变成住宅；例如艾尔海森从不无条件实施善行，深知此事的卡维心虚得不行，主动提出帮忙处理家务却就此揽下所有杂事等等…对一个身处低谷的人来说姑且算是烦恼，倒也证明了：改变不了的朋友才是生活中最不可动摇的过去。理性与感性、语言与建筑、知识与人情…从来都是无法统合的事物构成着镜子的两面，乃至整个世界。
- Long story short, I was able to learn of the secret location where the Canned Knowledge is being sold. You're welcome to accompany me if you're interested. ｜ 此事说来话长，我刚刚打听到秘密售卖罐装知识的地方，你们若是感兴趣，可以跟上来看看。
- The memories of rocks do not last long. Those memories that survive are rooted in powerful emotion. But as time passes, so these memories fade into obscurity. Erosion is the world's greatest destroyer of memories. ｜ 岩石的记忆并不很长，能留存其中的只有极为强烈的情感。时间越久，记忆便越模糊。「磨损」，正是世界加诸其身的导火索。

- Supposedly, she already did something similar in Qiaoying Village. All it took was a single glance for her to know all the terrain inside and out, and her maps were very precise too. ｜ 哎呀，那位前辈据说以前在翘英庄就做类似的工作，不管多复杂的地形，只要扫上一眼就知道得七七八八，绘图也十分精准。

- We also saw someone who looked like you in some memories. She even had the same name as you... ｜ 之前我们在回忆中也见到了与你相似，名字也一样的人…
- As for us, we had to be good and stay good... and search for treasure. ｜ 我们呢，就只能乖乖听话不乱跑…一直在这里「寻宝」啦。
- *sob* Father... ｜ 呜…老爹…
- Hee-hee, Stripy Ghost is invincible. Even Uncle Itto can't beat him! ｜ 嘿嘿，「白纹凶鬼」是无敌的，就连一斗哥哥也赢不了它。
- But y'know, it doesn't look like there's anything here that Soheil can use... ｜ 不过，一眼看过去，好像没有什么对于索赫尔来说有价值的东西？
- ...Disciples? ｜ 拜师？
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- I think I'm finally ready to go it alone now, just like Sensei said I should. And... maybe it's not such a big deal now if I can't grow any taller. Because what really matters... is that I have you to keep me company. ｜ 我好像确实像老师说的那样，可以独当一面了。这样子长不长高或许对我来说也没有那么重要了，因为现在重要的是…有你陪在我身边。

- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」

- Oh, goodness — yes, I'll go and warn them all right away! ｜ 啊——对对对，我这就回去，让他们都小心点！
- Gah, Paimon's pissed! We're gonna find that guy, and we're gonna settle the score! ｜ 可恶，一定要找那个混蛋，好好算清这笔账才行！气死我了！

- "Tricky Bulle Fruit" ｜ 「狡诈泡泡桔」
- I spent many, many years living on Mt. Aocang, bathing in the soft breeze and drinking the sweet dew of the mountains. At some point, I somehow gained wisdom and sentience. The lord of the mountain, Cloud Retainer, became aware of my existence and began to share many stories with me. She even passed on the secret of cultivation to me. ｜ 日复一日地餐风饮露，不知为何有了灵智。此处的主人——也就是留云仙君发现了我，给我讲了许多故事，还传授给我修行的秘法。
- Don't worry. Your tide will come in... ｜ 你别急，会有转机的…

- The hilichurl life sure is a tough one... ｜ 丘丘人的生活可真不容易呢…

- That's what they are, yes. ｜ 嗯，是莎兰树的。
- #Returning Travelers receive 21 extra opportunities in total to gain double drops, 3 of which may be used each day. The amount of double drop opportunities refreshes daily at 4:00 AM ({TIMEZONE}). Remember to use these opportunities in time. ｜ #回归的旅行者总共可获得21次双倍掉落的使用机会，每日最多可使用3次。在使用「原粹树脂」激活完成「祝圣秘境」、「炼武秘境」与「精通秘境」后的秘境古树，与完成「地脉衍出·启示之花」与「地脉衍出·藏金之花」时，获得双倍奖励。双倍掉落次数每日凌晨4点刷新（{TIMEZONE}），请旅行者及时使用。

- Tell me about the scattered Symphonies... ｜ 关于散落的「乐章」…
- Ugh! I'm... also happy for you. ｜ 嗯咳！我也为你们高兴。
- Morning, Chevreuse! ｜ 早啊，夏沃蕾。
- A few years ago, boss said he needed to make another trip to headquarters. He was already pretty weak then, and we all assumed he was going to get beaten again. ｜ 几年前，团长的身体已经很虚弱了，他说他要去总部，我们以为他又得去挨打。
- A saurian with a mark on its head... There was a little Tatankasaurus in the tribe like this a good many years ago. It would rarely interact with tribespeople, or even other Tatankasaurs. ｜ 头上有印记的龙啊…在十几年前，部族里也有一只这样的小突角龙，平时也很少和部族人还有突角龙众来往。
- Hmph. And yet there are some footprints. Freshly left, at that. Perhaps we might follow them and find something nonetheless? ｜ 哼…不过倒是有些脚印呢，看来是不久前留下的，不如循着沙上的脚印找找吧。
- (Huh? Dehya's winking at me... Maybe I should stay quiet for now?) ｜ （欸？迪希雅在对我眨眼？难道…现在还不该提出疑问？）
- Owner's Message ｜ 店主的留言
- You need the help of the Pari Mihir and Rashnu to obtain the Chaplet. Rashnu seems to be around the giant tree at the Hills of Barsom... ｜ 为了获得花冠，需要得到米希尔及拉沙鲁这两位花灵的协助。拉沙鲁似乎在跋松顶的巨树处…
- The things you're interested in are all really out there... Are all Sumeru scholars like this? ｜ 这个人关注的东西好奇怪…须弥学者都是这样的吗？
- Still, thanks for making that trip for me. Please take these as thanks. Now, if you'll excuse me, I have to go tend to my flowers. ｜ 不过，还是谢谢你帮我跑这一趟，这些东西给你，请收下吧，我要去打理店里的花了。
- But that jerk was greedy. He wanted to steal the decorations from Akitsu Yuugei and sell them for a profit. ｜ 但那个混蛋贪婪无度，想要偷窃秋津游艺上摆放的装饰，回去高价售卖。
- None of our project members have any experience maintaining awareness within a dreamscape, so that left us all feeling really depressed. But now that we know people like you exist, hope has been rekindled! ｜ 我们项目组的成员都没办法在梦境中保持清醒的认知，本来沮丧得不行，知道有您这样的人存在才燃起了希望。
- Frost Burial ｜ 霜葬
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Furnishings ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设购买获取
- (True knowledge is not something that can be drawn casually from the Akasha. Instead, the desert-dwellers get a more comprehensive education during their long walks across the sands...) ｜ （真正的学术著论，这可不是寻常「虚空」能提供的知识。但却在蛮荒的沙漠中，被沙漠人学习着…）
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Foreman's Message ｜ 领班的留言
- That's the one! I didn't think you would get it so quickly... Is it real? ｜ 就是这个！没想到你们这么快就拿回来了…是真的吗？
- Do you mean that the Inscription is over there? ｜ 意思是，铭印在那边吗？
- Sure, let's go together. ｜ 一起走吧。
- (Poor Zai. His family doesn't even have Sumpter Beasts...) ｜ （扎伊好可怜，家里都没有驮兽…）

- One of the fishing points registered with the Fontaine Fishing Association. It is near the ruins of the Central Laboratory, and boasts a rich variety of fish. Due to the (in)famous accident, very few anglers now dare to tread here... ｜ 枫丹钓鱼协会注册钓点之一，位于中央实验室遗址附近，鱼类资源丰富。由于那场众所周知的事故，目前很少有钓鱼爱好者敢于前往此地…
- Please wait here, I'll go get her. ｜ 请稍等，我去叫她过来。

- A central wall segment that connects to both horizontal and vertical walls.\nCourtyard walls are an extension of the crisscrossing field boundaries from history. They exist not to segregate neighbors and create distance but to promote harmonious coexistence. Clarifying boundaries is also a kind of contract, capable of minimizing conflicts that arise due to ambiguity. ｜ 承接纵横两道院墙的中枢。\n院墙是旧代阡陌的延伸，并不会导致邻里关系疏远，反而有助于和谐相处——明确的界线也是「契约」的一种，能将「归属模糊」引发的争执大幅减少。
- Haha, looks like you're one unlucky devil! ｜ 哈哈，那你可真是不走运！
- An on-site accident... We should note that down too. ｜ 工作区或许有状况，把这条线索记录下来吧。
- Understood. ｜ 我明白了。
- How strange. Our mistress has already passed. He... He deceived me. He deceived my people. ｜ 真是奇怪…女主人已经死去了，他骗了我…骗了我的族人。
- Huh? ｜ 欸？
- I won't lose! ｜ 我是不会输的！
- ...Ah, yes. How's your appetite been recently? ｜ …对了，您最近胃口如何呢？
- #Oh, we just ran into "immunity"-related issues often due to Knight {NICKNAME}'s Hydro resonance, that's all. ｜ #哎呀，只是因为{NICKNAME}骑士所共鸣的水元素，在那里经常遇到免疫的情况罢了。
- Alright, little wildcat. Rather than caring about how now-dead people lived, you should have a care for how you might yet die. ｜ 行了，小狞猫，比起关心死人怎么活，不如担心一下自己会怎么死。
- Come now, there's no need for such harsh words, Cloud Retainer. ｜ 留云，先不必如此针锋相对…

- But I've mentioned this before. If you want to trade in Slime Condensate futures, I'm afraid that all Slimes in the wild will go extinct. ｜ 就和我之前说的一样。如果史莱姆凝液想要形成期货交易，那只怕野外的史莱姆都要被抓光了。
- Paimon and I will be the best organizers, just you wait. ｜ 下次我和派蒙要当一个好主办方。

- Let's make a detour then. Heading up! ｜ 好，绕路吧。我们上去。

- Yes. Is that so strange? ｜ 嗯？是呀，很奇怪吗？
- They Call It "Ironskin" ｜ 稽古·刚体术
- Eh... Is this the insignia left behind by the Fatui guy? ｜ 咦…这个徽记…就是那个愚人众家伙留下的吗？

- And of course, our newest crewmembers contributed mightily! They swept away all opposition like it was so much flotsam and jetsam! ｜ 当然，我们的新人也立下了大功！新人们一直在前方拔掉硬茬，才让我们顺顺利利地抵达终点。

- Help the forest dwellers with Nilou ｜ 与妮露一起，帮助森林居民
- You sound just like Shenhe. The child is constantly telling one all sorts of stories from the city, as if one was partial to them... ｜ 你们一个两个都这样。申鹤那孩子也是天天跟我说城里的故事，弄得我多稀罕听一样。
- (Test) Excellent! Now, let's add a few of these, a touch of this, mix it all up... and I have no idea what will happen. ｜ （Test)真不错！让我们加些这个，还有这个，然后混在一起，我也不知道会出现什么。

- Edited Advertisement ｜ 修改后的广告
- Heh, no need to poke fun at me. I'd wager that you also felt that I wasn't the best candidate for the role. ｜ 二位就别寻我开心了。我打赌你们心里也觉得我不适合说出这些台词。
- Traveler and Paimon, let's go to the Jade Chamber. The view there is nicer and it's much more private, perfect for talking. ｜ 旅行者，派蒙，我们去群玉阁上说吧。那边景色更好，人也少些，适合谈话。

- No thanks, bye. ｜ 不用了，再见。

- Good job, greenhorns! Our foes lie vanquished. Now, maintain speed and heading. We sail on! ｜ 新人们，干得漂亮！海怪的爪牙败阵了，保持航速，继续前进！
- Ningguang ｜ 凝光
- It is strange, though. There didn't use to be this many hilichurls in Inazuma. I can't remember when that started... ｜ 说来也怪，以前稻妻是没多少丘丘人的。从哪天开始，就到处都是了。
- #You lose, I win, {NICKNAME}, and to the victor go the special-edition spoils.... ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你输了哦。作为胜者的奖励，这杯特别饮料…
- A traditional Liyue dessert. The water is brought to boil, various ingredients are added in, and then it is simmered for some time before rock sugar is added. The liquid mixture is then simmered until clear and thick. The lengthy simmering creates a soup with a gentle mouthfeel, causing the ingredients to melt with just a light sip. Suitable for all ages. ｜ 传统的璃月甜品。将水烧开后加入各种食材，慢炖一段时间，再加入冰糖，小火熬至汤汁微稠清亮。长时间的炖煮造就了柔软的口感，轻抿即化，老少咸宜。
- Just your hat? But then... Why can't you look for it yourself? ｜ 只是帽子而已？那为什么要躲起来？

- Arf, arf! ｜ 嗥嗥！
- You've got a really good memory! ｜ 记性真好啊你！

- Hey, hey! A—Are you sure you're alright? You're scaring us! ｜ 喂喂，你、你确定自己没问题吗？别吓唬我们呀！

- But... ｜ 可是…

- I just noticed there are traces of monsters around. ｜ 好，但在下刚才注意到，周围有魔物活动的痕迹。
- Omid'll definitely take me for a madman if I tell him. That's why I'd better only inform my boss. Please keep the secret for me... ｜ 奥米德要是听说我要去做冒险家了，一定会觉得我是疯了。所以我打算瞒着他，偷偷和老板说，你们也别告诉他哦…

In this day and age, becoming a famous detective requires more than just ability — you need publicity, too. Huh? C'mon, I'm being serious here! ｜ 说起来，宫司大人的八重堂也会出版推理小说吧？什么时候能请你当面引荐一番？在这个时代，要成为名侦探，实力以外，宣传也不能落下。哎呀呀，我哪有别的心思啦。

- Mysterious Amrita Seal... ｜ 奇异的甘露封印…

- #All right, stop picking on them. {NICKNAME} and Paimon are my friends. ｜ #好啦好啦，不要欺负别人。{NICKNAME}{M#他们}{F#她们}是拉娜姐姐的朋友哦。
- Exactly, exactly! I've got all the latest scoop on things happening in Inazuma right here — the freshest intel, if you will. ｜ 对啊对啊，我这里有不少稻妻的消息，都是「最新鲜」的绝密情报。
- Fei— Feiyun Commerce Guild!? Well, why didn't you say so? ｜ 飞…「飞云商会」！那…那早说啊。

- Then, support me. I'll be back, all you have to do is wait. ｜ 要真是我妹妹，就等着迎接凯旋的我们吧。
- Do you believe that? ｜ 这一点，你确信吗？
- We mustn't let our guards down, either. ｜ 我们也不能松懈。

- Check the exam requirements... ｜ 查看考核要求。

- A dull goblet made of a heavy metal. It was once inlaid with gemstones, but they have since been stripped off. ｜ 黯淡的重金属制成的杯形器皿，可以看出外壁上原本镶有宝石，又被挖掉了。
- "Guests from beyond the night-wind, remember not to ask about taboo mysteries, lest you court disaster." ｜ 「来自迷烟之外的众客人啊，你们要记得，不可求问于禁忌的奥秘，以至带来灾祸。」
- Ah, I'm so envious. If only I could be the one. Everyone's eyes would be on me... ｜ 啊，真羡慕啊，要是我能代表大家献花就好了，毕竟是个会被所有人瞩目的时刻呢…
- Qingce's verdant hills and stunning waters paired with the tranquil atmosphere here make it a place of extraordinary beauty. A rare blessing indeed. ｜ 轻策庄山青水绿，恬静怡人，是不可多得的灵秀之地。
- It seems my eyes are getting sharper and my arms stronger for swinging my hammer. Hold on, let me try hammering something... You should stand back. ｜ 眼睛好像更敏锐了，挥舞锤子的手也更有力气。稍等，我去找点东西练练手，你离远点。
- Yes, they were once Araji, Arayama, and Aramaha. The Vasoma Fruits are their memories. ｜ 他们是兰拉吉、兰雅玛、兰玛哈。而恒素果则是他们的记忆。
- You're a special one, Traveler! You've proved that again just now! ｜ 真是了不起啊，你让我又一次刮目相看了。
- Bring it on! ｜ 放马过来吧。
- Wonderful! Thank you, brave Nara. Three evil flames still burn. ｜ 嗯，太好了。谢谢勇敢的那菈。邪恶的火还有三个在燃烧。
- When Cyno is in the Pactsworn Pathclearer state activated by <color=#FFD780FF>Sacred Rite: Wolf's Swiftness</color>, Cyno will enter the Endseer stance at intervals. If he activates <color=#FFD780FF>Secret Rite: Chasmic Soulfarer</color> while affected by this stance, he will activate the Judication effect, increasing the DMG of this Secret Rite: Chasmic Soulfarer by 35%, and firing off 3 Duststalker Bolts that deal 100% of Cyno's ATK as <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG.</color>\nDuststalker Bolt DMG is considered Elemental Skill DMG. ｜ 在<color=#FFD780FF>圣仪·煟煌随狼行</color>的启途誓使状态下时，赛诺将间歇性处于「末途真眼」状态下。在该状态期间施放<color=#FFD780FF>秘仪·律渊渡魂</color>时，将触发「裁定」效果，使此次秘仪·律渊渡魂造成的伤害提升35%，并向前方发射3道渡荒之雷，造成等同于赛诺攻击力100%的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n渡荒之雷造成的伤害视为元素战技伤害。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Finish quest, complete parent quest ｜ 任务结束，完成父任务
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- A new branch taken from the center of the world.\nThere was once a giant tree that ran across the world, and this twig was part of it. Though it has been removed from the tree, their connection remains strong as ever. Therefore, as long as the giant white tree that symbolizes the center of the world does not die, it will never wither.\n\n"Trees" symbolize life. In one of the stories from a certain place, there was a person who had entrusted her consciousness to the white tree's branches before she passed away. In that way, neither her life nor hope would be lost, since the branches would grow and sprout where there was sunshine and rain, and would one day blossom and bear fruits.\n"Trees" also symbolize wisdom. In one of the legends, a sage hanging upside down on a tree had acquired the knowledge of how to inscribe runes and control sacred words, and thus followed the kingdom established along the tree's roots, eventually gaining a glimpse of the secret of the cosmos.\nAll knowledge, memory, and experience flow through this giant tree, just like a stream flows into a river, the river joins a sea, the sea turns into clouds, and the clouds rain onto the ground — just like life itself. ｜ 从世界的中心，取来的一段新枝。\n曾有一株巨木，贯彻了世界的各处；这节枝条是它的一部分。虽然被折下，与树的联系也从来没有断开。因此，只要那棵象征着世界中心的白色巨木没有死去，它就永远不会枯败。\n\n「树」是生的象征。在何处的故事中曾有一个人，在弥留之际将自己的意念托生在白树的枝条上。如此，生命与希望就不会失落，枝条会在有阳光雨露的地方生长、抽芽，最终开花结实。\n「树」同时也是智慧的象征。在何处的传说中，树上倒悬的贤人获得了书写符文操使言灵的知性，沿着树根建造的王国最终窥见了魔天的秘密。\n一切知识、记忆与体验在大树的根茎中奔流。就如溪流汇入大河、河流汇入海洋，又化为雨水落在大地上。就如生命一般。
- I wouldn't be so sure. Perhaps they simply pretend so that they may live more comfortable lives. ｜ 那可说不准。也许它们只是装作听不懂人说话，以此来让自己的生活更安逸一些呢。
- ...In this play, the masks and costumes serve to obscure the differences between characters, and by extension, the difference between human and machine... ｜ …这部戏用面具和罩袍模糊了角色之间的差异、人类与机械的区别…
- That and "Square Meals In the Basement"! My consultant, the erudite Mr. Zhongli, described it as a meticulous masterpiece! Ooh — quote that on the cover! It'll practically sell itself! ｜ 还有「地下开饭」那个呀！见多识广的钟离客卿可都说是好诗对！这不做个什么宣传宣传？

- "But... must save Nara... Ohh..." ｜ 「…可是，可是必须得救出那菈才行，呜呜…」

- That smells great! It's a success for sure! ｜ 好香啊！肯定是成功了！
- Paimon bets this is where the dragon sleeps... ｜ 简直就像是龙平时用来睡觉的地方呢…
- However, the defects of such a device are also evident. The barrel and launch tube must also withstand immense pressure, and must thus be very heavy, to the point that an ordinary knight would not be able to move it... ｜ 不过，这种装置的缺陷也很明显——弹膛和发射管要承受很大的压力，必须做得很厚重，普通的骑士根本扛不动…
- This is it, right? Okay then, use your Elemental Sight to look for the eye! ｜ 就是这个吗？好，用元素视野看看吧！
- Ah right, changing careers. Anyway, I think the whole caravan thing is wonderful. Our region wasn't very prosperous to begin with, and the land can't grow any crops. We have to pay a hefty price just to get basic food from outside. ｜ 对对对，转业。我觉得挺好的，我们这边本来就不富裕，地里也长不出什么庄稼，连粮食都要花大钱去外面买。
- Ah, friend, how your words wound my very soul! That lesson I was taught was sore enough. Shall we not let bygones be bygones? ｜ 小友这句话割得我心肝都疼了。这个过去就揭了吧，教训已经够了。
- Why are you still here? ｜ 你怎么还在这里？
- Your game has yet to be updated. Please log in again and retry. ｜ 客户端版本未更新到最新，请重新登录后再试
- What? You're looking for me? ｜ 什么，原来是找我的吗。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- When Neuvillette was talking to her in the Palais Mermonia, and she heard about Poisson, she couldn't hide her sadness and remorse. ｜ 上次那维莱特请她到沫芒宫谈话，当她得知白淞镇的受灾情况时，再怎么掩饰也还是看得出来她的难过和自责。

- When the equipping character's current HP increases or decreases, Elemental Skill DMG dealt will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color> for 6s. Max 3 stacks. This effect can be triggered once every 0.2s. When other party members' current HP increases or decreases, the equipping character's Max HP will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>14%</color> for 6s. Max 2 stacks. This effect can be triggered once every 0.2s. The aforementioned effects can be triggered even if the wielder is off-field. ｜ 装备者的当前生命值提升或降低时，元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>，该效果持续6秒，至多叠加3次，每0.2秒至多触发一次；队伍中其他角色的当前生命值提升或降低时，装备者的生命值上限提升<color=#99FFFFFF>14%</color>，该效果持续6秒，至多叠加2次，每0.2秒至多触发一次。装备者处于队伍后台时，依然能触发上述效果。

- I mean, we're just squad-mates... but it does sometimes feel like we're family as well... ｜ 明明大家只是小队成员而已…但有的时候，感觉就跟「家人」一样啊…
- Feels like it should be nine places, but whatever... Where should we bring Kichiboushi next? ｜ 虽然很想说「按照一半算，应该是九个地方」，不过不管了…接下来，我们要带吉法师去什么地方呢？
- The rations I take with me when traveling through the desert are usually completely tasteless. Once you've eaten enough of those, you'll be grateful for just about anything with some flavor. If I had to pick something, though... I wouldn't say I relish eating bugs or anything bug-related... ｜ 在沙漠中行走的时候，带的干粮通常坚硬无味，习惯之后就没有什么讨厌的东西了。非要说的话，跟虫子有关的食物还是有些难以接受…
- It's great that you like it here. ｜ 早柚能喜欢这里，太好了。

---
### Part 192

- When Thunder Strikes ｜ 打雷的时候…
- Indeed. Cloud Retainer kindly lent me her supreme cuisine machine. ｜ 留云的「机关烹饪神机」，我借来一用。
- Yeah, Paimon's feeling really hopeful! ｜ 是呀，总感觉看到了希望一样。
- Hi there! We're looking for Emura Ichigensai, are we in the right— ｜ 你好，请问「江村一玄斋」是在这里…

- Kaveh's a good kid with great potential. I had a casual chat with him once about some principles of mechanism construction. Hmm, how should I put it... He's too much of an artsy romantic, but at least he has some original ideas, which is rare nowadays. I've heard that he's fallen on some hard times, so I'm planning to invite him out for a good meal once my funding gets approved. It'll happen soon, promise. ｜ 卡维这孩子是个好苗子。我跟他随便聊过一些机关构造原理，怎么说呢…尽管浪漫思想和艺术细胞都有些过甚，但还算有自己的想法，不容易。听说他日子过得有点紧，我一直等着哪天拿到经费就请他吃顿好的…等着吧。

- A special combat training session prepared by the Adventurers' Guild. They say that you can use Lures to attract a great many opponents to the scene.\nLures mounted inside camps will start in a state of "Source Cold," which will cause it to buff nearby opponents at fixed intervals and increase the rate at which Sheer Cold will accumulate on your characters.\nYou might be able to change a Lure's state if you can find Scarlet Quartz and activate certain mechanisms nearby... ｜ 冒险家协会精心准备的战斗特训。据说只要启动「诱饵装置」，就会有很多敌人被吸引而来。\n营地中的「诱饵装置」初始会处于「寒源」状态，在间歇性使周围的敌人获得增幅效果的同时，还会提高角色身上「严寒」的累积速度。\n如果能找到「深赤之石」，或许就能启动周围的机关，并转变「诱饵装置」的状态…

- I always hear people saying that the director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor has an unorthodox approach to business. They think she's gone a little non compos mentis after being in the funeral business so long... What are these people talking about? The Wangsheng Funeral Parlor provides a legitimate and necessary service, which is the cornerstone of any successful enterprise. Work is just work — there are no good and bad jobs, or lucky and unlucky jobs, just jobs that need doing.\nIf I had one gripe, it would be that the director rarely comes to me for legal advice, hmph... ｜ 常听人说「往生堂」堂主行事奇特，怕是沾了丧葬业的怪毛病。这算什么话？「往生堂」从事的可是正经行业，是构成商业的基本单位。而且工作就是工作，岂有高低贵贱，吉凶险恶之分？\n不过，那位堂主倒是没怎么来光顾过我的生意，唔…

- Legend has it that the moon once had a face.\nUnder the fierce moon's face, like a white bow, the paths through the forest labyrinth would bring lost people to jade and amber dreams. This forest labyrinth has ceased to exist for hundreds of years — and yet even a hundred thousand winters must seem like a day in the garden of dreams. ｜ 传说月曾有相。\n而在白弓般的凶相之月下，森林迷宫的路途会将迷误之人带到翡翠色与琥珀色的梦里。森林的迷宫在数百年前就已经不复存在了，但千百年的岁月在梦的花园中或许也不过是一朝一夕之事吧。

The enemies' Hydro RES will be greatly increased. ｜ 营地中存在「深水赋能器·芒」：周期性为附近的敌人施加水元素附着，提升敌人的攻击力、物理抗性和所有元素抗性，其中水元素抗性大幅提升，并提高敌人的抗打断能力。

- Water Droplet!? Wait, did the Water Droplet talk? ｜ 「小水珠」？「小水珠」居然说话了！
- Can't say it's interesting... Uhh, I should say...unique, or something... ｜ 也不能说是微妙…应该是说…奇异，还是什么的…
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- I don't collect crystal entirely for money. ｜ 我收集晶矿也不完全是为了赚钱。
- The Lord of the Night? As in... the one who rules over the Night Kingdom!? ｜ 什么，夜神？就是夜神之国的那个夜神？！
- Last time we were here working on the novel, all you ordered for us was the plainest Kushikatsu! ｜ 上次在这里赶稿的时候，你给我们吃的只是最大众的炸串啊！
- Take care. Please come again. ｜ 慢走，欢迎下次光临。

- ...I—I didn't mean it like that! ｜ 我…我没这意思！
- Records of the Ancient Oases: Part III ｜ 古绿洲记事·其三
- "Though the front half was lost, we've somehow managed to stay afloat on the remaining back half for some time now... Now that's what I call a ship, haha! Unfortunately, most of the ship's load is probably sitting at the bottom of the sea by now..." ｜ 「…居然前半截没了，剩下后半截还能飘这么远，真不愧是我的船，哈哈哈…不过，船上的东西大概都已经沉进海里了…」
- Yumkasaurus ｜ 匿叶龙
- Medium-sized fish with a flat body and a gentle temperament, these fish are considered to be one of the least irritable creatures in the waters of Natlan. Capable of consuming almost anything, their utterly indiscriminate eating habits make them natural cleaners of the underwater world, a trait that has earned them high praise among locals.\nLegend has it that in the distant past, Greenwave Sunfish inhabited waters where the nutrient levels were excessively high, to the point that thick layers of algae would float upon the surface. It was thanks to their presence that this algae was kept in check. Even today, the crystal-clear, azure waters of the People of the Springs may be in part a testament to their contribution. ｜ 体型扁平的中型鱼类，性格温吞，被认为是纳塔各水域中最不易怒的生物。什么都能往肚里塞的饮食习惯使得它们成为了天然的水域清理者，在民间广受好评。\n据传，许久以前，青浪翻车鲀曾在营养物质过度富集，以至于水体表面漂浮着厚重藻类的水域出没，抑制了藻类的过度繁衍。如今「流泉之众」一带的明彻湛蓝的水质，或许也有它们的几分功劳。
- This wall looks a bit odd... Maybe there's some special trick to it! ｜ 这面墙看起来有些奇怪…会不会有什么玄机？

- Actress ｜ 演员
- Let's keep playing. Ignore him. ｜ 继续，别管他。
- He's a mysterious character! He comes and goes like the wind, and is always occupied with important business. I like the fact that he delegates some of the smaller jobs to me sometimes, it's nice to feel like part of the team, you know... What do you mean, "errand runner"? I don't see it like that at all! Okay, well yes, technically I run errands for him. But still, I really appreciate it! ｜ 他很神秘，来如影，去如风，每天都有很重要的任务要去处理。他还经常会给我安排一些小任务，就好像我已经是他的小队成员了一样…嗯？只是跑腿？不不不，虽然确实是跑腿，可是我很珍惜的！
- Alright, guys... make sure you get every last one of those flyers back, okay? ｜ 我说你们…一定要把那些小广告都好好清理干净啊！
- ...Very well. Then, follow me. ｜ …既然如此，就随我来吧。
- No, no, it's not the gift... ｜ 不，不是礼物的问题…
- After some more time... ｜ 又过了一段时间…

- "The fuses and cannonballs have been placed separately to prevent any accidents from occurring!" ｜ 「库房内炮弹与引信分离存放，以免意外事故之发生！」
- About Us: Encounters ｜ 关于我们·相遇
- The Pure Electro Hypostasis is immune to Frozen, Stun, Petrification, and Electro DMG while persistently applied with Electro.\nThe Pure Electro Hypostasis possesses a Revival Prism: When the Pure Electro Hypostasis's HP would be expended, it will not be defeated but suffer Expose Weakness and undergo Energy Revival.\nWhile Expose Weakness is in effect, the Elemental Reaction DMG inflicted on the Pure Electro Hypostasis will expend the Prismatic Energy of the Revival Prism. After <color=#{0}>2 points of Prismatic Energy is expended</color>, the Pure Electro Hypostasis will be defeated.\nAfter the start of Energy Revival, the Pure Electro Hypostasis will need to complete three Actions before the revival culminates and Expose Weakness ends: At the same time, each point remaining of the Revival Prism's Prismatic Energy will heal the Pure Electro Hypostasis for 2 HP. ｜ 「至纯的无相之雷」免疫冻结、眩晕、石化和雷元素伤害，并且总是具有雷元素附着。\n「至纯的无相之雷」拥有「复苏棱镜」：生命值耗尽时不会被击倒，而是遭受「弱点暴露」并开始「蓄能复苏」。\n「弱点暴露」期间，对「至纯的无相之雷」造成元素反应伤害，即可消耗「复苏棱镜」的「棱镜能量」。耗尽<color=#{0}>2点「棱镜能量」</color>后，即可击倒「至纯的无相之雷」。\n「蓄能复苏」开始后，「至纯的无相之雷」行动3次后就会完成「蓄能复苏」并结束「弱点暴露」：此时，「复苏棱镜」每有1点「棱镜能量」剩余，就治疗「至纯的无相之雷」2点。

- Exactly. Most scholars are fond of incense, since the smell supposedly helps them clear their minds and discover new knowledge. ｜ 没错。学者大多喜欢熏香，据说闻这些味道能让人安定心神，帮助探索知识。
- Sounds reasonable to me. ｜ 不无不可。

Additionally, Charged Attacks from bow-using characters will unleash a shockwave when they hit opponents, dealing one instance of AoE DMG. - That's not true, Bluey, you're lying! If that's the case, why didn't you just let those beasts eat me back then? If humans and beasts can't be friends, and you're a beast, you shouldn't have helped me! ｜ 但是，阿蓝，你骗人。如果是这样的话，为什么那时候你不让野兽把我吃掉呢？如果人和野兽不能成为朋友，你是野兽一边的话，那你就不该帮我！

- Haha! So, this is how we'll do it— ｜ 哈哈哈，是这样的——

- ...Okay then, I'll wait for you. ｜ 那…好，我会等你来的。
- And, somehow, The Captain finds out about it, goes to fight the Pyro Archon, and calls her out for having a solution but refusing to use it... ｜ 「队长」不知为什么也知道了这件事，于是去和火神大人打了一架，质疑她为何有办法却不愿意用。

- Thunder can mask the sound of movement, which is why it's our friend. ｜ 雷声可以掩盖行动的声响，是我们的好朋友。
- Then, from what you're saying, this Wenut is even older than you are, which should also make it your elder. ｜ 这么说来，它的年纪比斯露莎还要大，也算是斯露莎的前辈了。

- The sages have placed spies everywhere on the other side of the Wall. I'll follow you as a bodyguard. ｜ 目前墙内到处都是贤者的眼线，我会作为保镖跟随你一起行动。
- The strangely-shaped stone lantern seems to be emitting an ominous energy. ｜ 形状奇特的石灯，似乎放射着令人不安的能量。
- I haven't really gotten around that much myself. I tend to stop pretty frequently while traveling, so at best I've only seen a few of Chenyu Vale's most famous sights. ｜ 我就没什么见识了，一路走走停停，只是勉强看过了沉玉谷名气最大的几个地方…
- Hey, imagine if we could build our tracks all over the world. Traveling would be so much easier! *cough* ｜ 如果这样的轨道能够铺满整个世界的话，说不定以后出行就会变得非常方便，咳咳…
- In a moment. It's not the time yet. ｜ 稍等一下，现在还不是我们该上的时候。
- His name... is Xbalanque. ｜ 他的名字是，希巴拉克。

- Party includes Trial Characters ｜ 队伍中包含试用角色

- Oh, so you're Titu! We met a sentry on our way here named Yukom, who wanted you to get back to your post! ｜ 原来你就是蒂图啊，我们来的路上曾经遇见过一个在哨站站岗的人，叫尤考姆，叫你回去站岗呢！

- Phew... I finally got my change of clothes. Been a while since I felt this good! ｜ 呼…终于换上新衣服了，舒服！
- We pursued the two thieves deep into Mt. Hulao, only to see their shadows suddenly rise and fall, rise and fall... ｜ 我们追逐那二贼从云翳深处直到那琥牢山，只见二贼身影忽起忽落，忽起忽落，忽起忽落…

- Slow down. ｜ 站住。
- The Oratrice's energies suddenly go berserk as the "death sentence" is enacted.\nYou race toward Furina with great urgency.\nYou reach out your hand, and the tears streaking down her face land on your outstretched hand, transporting you into another space.\nAt this time, Neuvillette is also consumed by the Oratrice's light, causing him to enter a separate space as well. Before him stands Focalors, and above her head is a giant, rotating blade of pure energy in the shape of a sword. ｜ 「谕示裁定枢机」的能量突然暴走，「死刑」开始执行。\n情急之下， 你全力奔向芙宁娜。\n你伸出手，她脸颊滑落的泪滴落到你的手上，你进入了某个空间。\n此时那维莱特也被「谕示裁定枢机」的光芒吞没，他进入了另一个空间。他的面前站着芙卡洛斯，而在她的头顶，一个形似巨剑的能量体正在旋转。
- "Hmm. Our matches have been quite the thought exercise. But that is precisely why they are so interesting..."\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Ningguang" starts with the Talent Card "Strategic Reserve" equipped.</color> ｜ 「跟你对局颇费心思，不过，有趣之处也在这里…」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「凝光」初始装备有天赋牌「储之千日，用之一刻」。</color>

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge {0}: Hammering Blow</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Rules</color>\n1. Gain 1 point when collecting an <color=#FFCC33FF>Adventure Coin</color> during the challenge. Gain 5 points when collecting a <color=#FFCC33FF>Large Adventure Coin</color>. Reach the target score to complete the challenge.\n2. <color=#FFCC33FF>Elevated Platforms</color> will rise randomly during the challenge. A Plunging Attack on it will knock it back to the ground and drop Adventure Coins.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Trial Character</color> \nVenti \n\n\n ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>挑战{0} 重重重下坠攻击</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战规则】</color>\n1.挑战中拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>冒险币</color>时获得1分，拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>大型冒险币</color>时获得5分，达到目标积分时挑战成功。\n2.挑战中会随机升起<color=#FFCC33FF>「浮土平台」</color>，对其进行下落攻击可以将它打回地面，并产生冒险币。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【试用角色】</color>\n温迪\n\n\n
- Silver, it hurts... My head is spinning... All I can see is stars swirling in front of me. ｜ 西尔弗，我很难受，脑子里一团糟…眼前像有星星在飞…
- It feels so weird being called that all of a sudden. Ugh... You see, as I said, I'm here because I drifted here... ｜ 突然被这么称呼还有点不习惯，欸呀，其实是这样，你们看之前我也说了，我是漂流到这里的…

- Hold on! Remember what we discussed? ｜ 等等，别急，我们不是商量好了吗？！

- I once heard a Mondstadt fable about courage being what it takes for birds to learn to fly. But I think that you must first possess a yearning for the boundless skies before you would have any inclination, let alone the courage, to spread your wings and try to fly. For me, Liyue is that boundless sky. ｜ 我听过一则流传在蒙德的故事：勇气让小鸟学会了飞翔。不过，应该是先有对浩瀚天空无与伦比的向往，才会有振翅的冲动与勇气吧。对我来说，璃月，就是那片天空。

- Alas, a shame... If only... ｜ 唉…可惜啊，可惜…
- Yeah, or else they wouldn't have been that generous! ｜ 是呀，不然他们怎么可能会那么好心呢。

- Accepting the commission of the Tianshu, Uncle Tian, Ganyu very naturally slips into her work mode, coming to the aid of her junior colleague Huixin with ease in the latter's time of need. To express her thanks, Huixin invites you all to Xinyue Kiosk to have a meal... ｜ 受到身为「天枢星」的天叔委托，甘雨很自然地进入了工作状态，顺利帮助了后辈慧心解决了工作上的困扰。为了表示感谢，慧心邀请你们来到新月轩参加饭局…
- If you hadn't met these nice people, things could have been a lot more dangerous for you, Teucer. I hope you said a big thank-you to them? ｜ 如果不是遇上了这两位，托克的处境可能就危险了。有好好道谢过了吗？

- A flower with a shape like floating wings. Its petals sway in an unbelievably relaxed, serene manner as they are caressed by the wind. ｜ 形如飘然羽翼的花，花瓣的姿态在风中无比悠然。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge {0}: Boulder Run</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Rules</color>\n1. Gain 1 point when collecting an <color=#FFCC33FF>Adventure Coin</color> during the challenge. Gain 5 points when collecting a <color=#FFCC33FF>Large Adventure Coin</color>. The challenge will be deemed successful when the target score is reached.\n2. The challenge will contain fast-moving <color=#FFCC33FF>Giant Pinballs</color> that, when touched, will send the character(s) flying.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Trial Character</color> \nMona \n\n\n ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>挑战{0} 注意巨球来袭</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战规则】</color>\n1.挑战中拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>冒险币</color>时获得1分，拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>大型冒险币</color>时获得5分，达到目标积分时挑战成功。\n2.挑战中存在快速移动的<color=#FFCC33FF>「巨大弹球」</color>，触碰时会将角色击飞。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【试用角色】</color>\n莫娜\n\n\n

- So do they have any purpose? ｜ 那这种湖有什么用？

- Cooool! The door is open. We got it right! ｜ 哦哦！前面的门开了，我们猜对了！
- But the area between the northeast and southwest is so huge! After all, in a broad sense, the northeast and southwest of Jademouth can include... pretty much the whole world? ｜ 不过，东北和西南，范围也太大了！毕竟，从广义而言，宝玦口的东北和西南，不就包括整个世界了吗？
- "Many hands make light work!" ｜ 「众人拾柴火焰高」！
- The great dragon erected many peculiar structures across the land. In the ancient legends, the great dragon's outstretched wings could together blot out the light of the sky. Perhaps such descriptions were not hyperbole, or perhaps such wording was a metaphor for their desire to see beyond the sky.\nBut now, the traces of said ancient dragon have already vanished, and the people of today can only but glimpse the forging techniques of that ancient civilization through the shattered remnants of those massive structures and their patterns. ｜ 巨龙曾在大地上竖立诸多构型奇特的建筑。古老的传说中，巨龙的羽翼相互勾连便可遮住天光，或许这形容并未存有夸张之处，又或者这句话其实是他们觊觎天外之域的隐喻。\n不过如今远古之龙行迹已绝，现在人们只能从那巨大构造的残型与纹路里，窥得一些古老文明的铸就之法。
- "For the Harbingers!" ｜ 「为了执行官大人！」
- After the Waverider stops at all Mooring Points, a wind current will be generated. ｜ 将浪船停泊在所有停泊点后，将会生成风场。

- To be honest, all this has made me too busy to have time for anything else, but I don't think that this is a bad thing, necessarily. ｜ 说实话，虽然我现在因为需要处理很多遗留问题而忙得不可开交，但我并不觉得这些都是坏事。

- Haha. Well, once I'd exacted that justice, I came here. Thankfully, the innkeeper was willing to take me in and let me loaf about the place. ｜ 呵呵，讨到公道之后，我就来了这里。所幸掌柜的收留了我，让我在这做个闲人。
- Crimson Fox ｜ 红狐

- Do you know this... what was it they called him... "Idle Old Man Mposo"? ｜ 你认识这位呃…怎么说来着，「无所事事的恩波索爷爷」吗？

- Ahem... As experienced Hunters, the layout of the city reminds you of places once traveled. You recall the sight of tree-lined streets and the gentle tranquility of days gone by... ｜ 咳咳…王国首都的布局令身经百战的逐影猎人想起了曾经去过的那些地方。绿树成荫，和平安治。

I keep asking her if we can go adventuring in her home world together, but each time I bring it up she sort of avoids the topic... She's probably just worried about my safety. Her home world sounds like a dangerous place, for sure. ｜ 她是异世界来的「断罪皇女」，可厉害了！我不止一次和她说想要去她的家乡冒险，但每次说到这里她就吞吞吐吐的…嗯，一定是担心我的安危吧，看来她的家乡真的是很凶险的地方。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- When Vaporize is triggered, an Energy Blast will occur, dealing DMG to surrounding opponents. ｜ 引发蒸发反应时，会释放能量冲击，对周围的敌人造成伤害。
- Catch fish successfully 500 times. ｜ 成功钓鱼500次。

- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Hmm... You really think I shouldn't limit myself to Mondstadt? ｜ 嗯…你的意思是，不能把自己局限在蒙德城里吗…

- Are you afraid of losing? There's no need to care about winning or losing when playing games! ｜ 那菈朋友是不是怕输？玩游戏，不要在乎输赢！
- In your eyes, the value of a human life is nothing compared to those cold laws you hold so dear. ｜ 在你的眼里，生命的价值根本比不上你手中那些无情的规则和律法吧？

- That's decided then! ｜ 那就这么说定喽！

- A dish made out of a luxurious variety of ingredients... dumped into scalding-hot water and boiled beyond recognition. As if the taste of everything and nothing at the same time isn't bad enough, you'll want to watch out for the sand, too... ｜ 用料丰富的菜肴。所有的食材被简单粗暴地熬成一大锅，各种食材混杂的味道实在说不上好。咦…怎么菜里还有沙子？
- Elemental Reactions ｜ 元素反应
- A standard-issue honorary instructor's cap, only granted to those who turn down a promotion. ｜ 制式的教官帽子。是拒绝了晋升的军官才能获得的殊荣。
- Recipe: Fragrant Mashed Potatoes ｜ 食谱：香浓土豆泥
- And you! Don't you start with that nonsense too! ｜ 喂，你也不要跟人学坏啦…
- Go! ｜ 去。
- What happened between you two? ｜ 你们之间发生了什么？
- Um, I don't have one. This must've been left behind by an adventurer or something like that. Speaking of which... ｜ 呃…我可没有什么动物同伴，这大概是之前来这里的冒险家之类的留下的吧。话说回来…
- Old memories should be the nutrient of new life, not shackles keeping you in the endless loop of pain. ｜ 旧的回忆应当为新的生活提供动力，而不是在其中进行盘旋不变的痛苦循环。
- In that case, I'll get someone to prepare a bed for you... oh! Or would you like something to eat first? Oh yes, and there's these two books that I'd like us to read together. ｜ 那我找人去收拾床铺…呃，还是先帮你们做点好吃的？对了，我还留了两本书，想和你们一起看。
- Did he get separated from us? Should we wait here or turn around and look for him? ｜ 是和我们走散了吗？我们在这里等他，还是回去找一找？
- Oh, it's you, and the Lady Priestess too. ｜ 是你们啊，还有代宫司大人。
- Push the little Saurian forward! ｜ 向前推动小龙！
- Ah, think you thus? Then we might yet be friends. If time permits, we may discuss this issue in more detail. ｜ 你也这么认为对吧，说不定我们很合得来啊。有机会我们可以好好讨论一下这个问题。

- Arlecchino gains 1% All Elemental and Physical RES for every 100 ATK she has in excess of 1,000. The maximum RES increase she can gain this way for each is 20%. ｜ 基于阿蕾奇诺的攻击力超过1000的部分，每100点攻击力都将使阿蕾奇诺获得1%所有元素抗性与物理抗性。通过这种方式，阿蕾奇诺的所有元素抗性与物理抗性至多提升20%。
- A dull goblet made of a heavy metal. It was once inlaid with gemstones, but they have since been stripped off. ｜ 黯淡的重金属制成的杯形器皿，可以看出外壁上原本镶有宝石，又被挖掉了。
- We can't proceed any further in. ｜ 不能再继续前进了。
- In the middle of a hazy night. ｜ 「胧夜正中」。
- "You and the art you symbolize are not only beautiful, but also lively and powerful, so much so that it was prohibited." ｜ 「您与您所象征的艺术，它不仅仅是美，更是因太过有威胁力而被禁止的生命力。」

- In other words, you have too many other things to worry about? ｜ 要操心的事太多了吧。
- Ow... I'm fine! ｜ 啊…不算什么！

- And whaddaya know, that rich old fart kicked the bucket after just a few years, leaving his house to her. And what's hers is Benoit's — all in all, a pretty quick way to win a life "up there," if you catch my drift. ｜ 才几年老头就死啦，老头的房子当然就归小秋了，小秋的就是他的，这下他不就一口气成为「上面人」了吗？
- Aerosolized medication can affect both the user and the environment, granting them more obvious effects than ordinary essential oils! ｜ 弥漫在空气里的药剂能同时作用于使用者和环境，相比普通的精油，效果应该更明显！
- So Curve is... ｜ 那曲线…
- Many ladies in the Court of Fontaine like to spray their perfume onto a delicate lace fan, allowing them to generate a pleasant fragrance with each flick of the wrist. It's quite an ingenious method. ｜ 不少枫丹廷的淑女喜欢将香水喷在小巧的蕾丝折扇上，扇动时便会有阵阵幽香。的确是十分巧妙的做法。
- Dropped by Lv. 40+ Ruin Sentinels ｜ 40级以上遗迹机兵掉落
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Fence Corner: Long Watch.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「栏楯转角-『瞩视无遗』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Once I carry out the great work of eliminating the power of darkness, the Vourukasha Oasis will recover its pure and pristine hues. ｜ 待吾铸定伟业，彻底驱除黯色的力量，必将使「甘露花海」的色彩重归纯净无暇。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Hmm... An oversight on my part. ｜ 略有差池…
- *sigh* People are strange creatures. We know full well that time is limited, but we still kid ourselves by saying things like, "Oh, surely just a bit longer can't hurt..." ｜ 唉，人真是奇怪的生物，明知道没有时间可以浪费了，但还是会不自觉地想「再看一会儿就好」之类的…
- Since this is a photography course, there has to be a subject. We will need a model. ｜ 既然是留影，自然少不了被记录的对象，我需要一位模特来配合。
- If I could successfully develop a reagent that chases Fungi away, I could make a real killing by selling it to the merchant caravans! ｜ 如果能成功调配出蕈兽一闻就逃之夭夭的试剂，一定能卖给商队大赚一笔！
- If the battle truly was that fierce, then perhaps we might be able to deduce something from the terrain. ｜ 如果战况激烈到那种程度…那我也许能从地形里观察出一些东西来。
- But now that the Phlogiston Wings have entered the equation, it's sparked a debate over whether our tribe needs the qucusaurs at all... ｜ 但在「燃素翼」出现后，却迅速出现了「花羽会还需不需要绒翼龙」的议论…
- And then we'd have one more person who has to address Lisa as "upperclasswoman"... ｜ 那柯莱也要叫丽莎师姐了…
- Wait, what? Why? Didn't he praise you? ｜ 啊？为什么？不是夸奖么？
- Later, I heard that he sparred with Sensei, too. Sensei was advanced in years by then, and unfortunately, that match used up every last ounce of energy in his body... ｜ 后来听说，他又去找师父比试，而师父年事已高，在那场比试中耗尽了最后的元气…
- "Imaginarium Theater" ｜ 「幻想真境剧诗」
- (Done. Let's get started on the next drink.) ｜ （完成了，开始下一杯吧。）
- Her dad gave her a deck, and it's her favorite thing. She takes it with her everywhere. ｜ 小郁爸爸送了她一副牌，她一直很爱惜，不管到哪儿都带着。
- Go to the office ｜ 前往办公室
- Thus the lords and the rich men wept, crying: "Verily this is the triumph of mortals, the end of slavery!" But only I knew. Only I understood... ｜ 王公与富商们纷纷含泪激赏——这是凡人的凯旋，这是奴役的结束。但我明知，只有我明晓…
- Sefana ｜ 瑟法娜
- Illusory Passerby C ｜ 幻影路人C
- Haha, that does sound like one of Hu Tao's antics. ｜ 哈哈，倒真是胡大堂主会做出的事情。
- Huh? The soldiers from Sangonomiya seized the Nobushi's stolen goods? But didn't Gorou say all the stolen goods were headed to the International Trade Association? ｜ 珊瑚宫士兵从野伏众那里收缴了货物？可是五郎不是说被劫走的货物，都流向万国商会了吗？
- He knew who you were and the things you'd done, and despite that, he was willing to give everything up for your sake. He's the reason that you haven't felt the compulsion to steal in all these years. ｜ 他知晓你的身份与罪业，却仍旧愿意为你倾尽一切。正因为有他在，这十年间你才没有被盗窃的欲望折磨。
- Teachings of Justice ｜ 「正义」的教导
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- #Hey, {NICKNAME}! Paimon! ｜ #喂——{NICKNAME}、派蒙！
- A succulent shaped like the paw of a great animal.\nIt is said that there was a time when the plants that grew here could shapeshift at will, almost as if they were some kind of enigmatic dragons. Some would appear poisonous or dangerous in other ways to avoid being eaten by herbivores.\nThe dramatic "linework" exhibited in the form of these plants is full of tension... ｜ 形如巨大动物爪掌的多肉植物。\n据说从前，生长在此处的植物与神秘莫测的龙一般，可自如转变自己的形体，有些就会拟态成危险或含有毒素的样子，以免被食草的兽类啃食。\n在这种植物身上，可以找到极具张力的线条走向…
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- A legendary goblet that can withstand extremely high temperatures. It still retains a degree of warmth even though it is now empty. ｜ 传说中是能耐流火高热的杯盏，如今其中空无一物仅有余温。
- A group of Treasure Hoarders have made camp in the wilderness and are up to no good. Defeat them to put an end to this threat. ｜ 一群盗宝团成员在野外扎营，意图盗夺宝物。清理这片区域，击败所有盗宝团成员。
- Is she making lots of nice friends? ｜ 她有没有交到朋友呢？
- I do love spending time in Aaru Village. But each day I spend here is also a reminder that if I ever start to let my guard down... sooner or later, the day may come when I no longer have a life to return to here. ｜ 我很喜欢在阿如村度过的日子。同时，在这里度过的每一天也都在提醒我，如果我因为松懈失察而酿成大错的话，就再也无法回到这样的生活了。
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Yes. How much for your whole stock? ｜ 是的，我们想把这些都买下，要多少钱？
- Fairytale Figurine: Evidently So ｜ 童话巧像-「显而易见」
- It's so hard to find the right combination! ｜ 组合太难了！
- Report back to Liu Su ｜ 向刘苏回报
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- But with him being out on business for a few days, who would take care of business and the guests if I were to take time off? Maybe some other time. ｜ 这几天他不在，要是我也请假，谁来接待上门谈生意的人呢？还是过阵子再说吧。
- Of course not, I always respect the wildlife. ｜ 怎么会，我是动物之友。
- Complete the Safe Destruction Challenge ｜ 通过安全击破挑战
- What will your boss think when he finds out? ｜ 你们老大知道了会怎么想？
- Oopsie... There's only one way left to go, then. ｜ 哎呀，看上去果然还是惊动到了，这样的话就没办法了…
- The so-called Weapons Specialist, in truth, is a knight who is responsible for testing experimental weapons. ｜ 所谓「武器官」，就是对实验性装备进行测试的骑士。
- You're right. I'll give it a try. ｜ 也对，玩一次看看吧。
- Deep Contemplation ｜ 凝神思索
- We would be most grateful! ｜ 真是太感谢了！
- That speedrun challenge was illuminated by the glow of fireworks! A sight most majestic, a splendorous scene not oft seen! ｜ 那场竞速挑战被漂亮的烟花点缀，蔚为壮观，成了难得一见的美景。
- Pleased to make your acquaintance. I am Lyney's magic assistant, and if you have work-related inquiries, please ask Lyney. If you have questions related to seeing a magic show, please ask the ticket office. You want to talk to me? ...Then get to the point. ｜ 初次见面，我是林尼的魔术助手，工作事宜请咨询林尼。观看演出请咨询售票处。找我？…请长话短说。
- Complete Illimani's challenge ｜ 完成伊伊马尼的挑战
- The Grand Master has assigned the Cavalry Company to this mission. As such, I will be paying you a visit in three days. ｜ 大团长指定骑兵小队执行本次任务。因此，我将在三天后登门拜访。
- Time Remaining This BP Period: ｜ 本期剩余时间：
- 5 seconds to firework launch ｜ 距离烟花燃放还有5秒
- Then... where do we start? ｜ 这要怎么找…
- Great! Now let me think... You could start by asking Ms. Tang Wen and Mr. Ramsay. Perhaps they might have some new ideas. ｜ 那太好了，我想想…请你直接去问问汤雯小姐和拉姆齐先生吧，也许他们会有什么新想法。

### Part 193

- Mystery Cache effect triggered, character selection phase skipped ｜ 触发神秘收获效果，已跳过本次角色选择环节

- Thanks for your's and your family's trust. ｜ 感谢您与您家族的信任。
- Ancient Teatree King ｜ 古树茶王
- But if the water covered the mountain, wouldn't the people inside suffocate? Or were they going to build a super tall tower to breathe through? ｜ 可要是水面没过了山顶，里边的人不也会闷死吗？难道还要造一座很高、很高的塔来通气？
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param8:P}/{param9:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param8:P}/{param9:P}
- And so, the rebels fought duel after duel with the aristocrats' lackeys all across Mondstadt. ｜ 于是，游侠们和贵族们的爪牙们，就这样在蒙德各处展开了一场又一场的对决。
- Complete the Strike the Stars challenge ｜ 完成「霆击星流中」挑战
- Paimon is a good kid. ｜ 派蒙是个好孩子。
- I think that's a great way to live your life. ｜ 挺好的，我觉得「随便」是种很棒的人生态度。
- Swimming ｜ 游泳
- Leisure Time ｜ 闲暇时光
- Astrology ｜ 占卜位置
- ...It felt just like a dream to me. ｜ …简直像是我的一场梦。
- Alright, run along and play now. I'll come along in a sec. ｜ 去吧，先去玩吧，等会我来陪你。
- Opposing Fungus ｜ 敌方蕈兽
- This tower seems to hear my wishes... I just need to think the thought and it will change its brightness. ｜ 这座高塔…似乎能听到我的愿望。只要我想，它就可以为了我变化光暗。
- Otherworldly Story ｜ 异世界行记
- As the shard of light merges with Liloupar's magic bottle, you feel a little of your own power being pulled away... ｜ 随着闪光的碎片汇入利露帕尔的魔瓶，你感到自身的力量也被抽离了少许…
- I still want to keep performing, so I might join another troupe. ｜ 我还打算继续演戏，之后考虑换个剧团吧。
- Let's investigate the area again. ｜ 还是再去调查一下现场的痕迹吧。
- Dadao ｜ 大盗
- Springtide Advent ｜ 春几回
- He's not a bad person, but I just wish he'd let me go off to more places for adventure. I mean, we can't leave the country, sure, but couldn't we at least go to some mysterious place like Tsurumi Island? ｜ 他人还不错啦，就是如果能让我去更多的地方冒险就好了。哪怕不能出国，也可以去鹤观那种一看就很神秘的地方呀。
- A floral scene with broad leaves as the core that is full of vitality. Even in the completely still floral courtyard, one can feel the balmy breeze. ｜ 宽大叶片为核心的「花景」，生机盎然。哪怕在完全静止的「花庭」中，也能让人感受到和煦的微风。
- Who knows, maybe we'll get that "sound of someone playing along" that Kazuha was talking about! ｜ 也许会有万叶说的那种跟人合奏的奇妙感觉呢！
- #Oh, it's you, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}. So here's the thing. Have you ever heard of a shrine's divine intervention? ｜ #是你啊…{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}，是这样的，你听说过神龛显灵的事吗？
- Hero of Simulanka ｜ 希穆兰卡的勇者
- Unfortunate, but most entertaining. ｜ 这一手还算精彩。
- You and Paimon enjoy the snacks together.\nThey look very beautiful, but they are tasteless like pure water. ｜ 和派蒙一起享用了点心。\n虽然外观精美，却和清水一样什么味道也没有。
- Just in time, I was about to go look for you. ｜ 正好，我刚要去喊你们。
- Adventurer, please! ｜ 冒险家，拜托了！
- Hmm... In that case, simply take it as if I added a "so I've heard" to that statement. ｜ 嗯…那您就当我已经加上了「据说」二字吧。
- Neuvillette does not need a Vision to manipulate the elements. However, there were some things he learned only after regaining his complete form:\nSeverely wounded in the great war of vengeance, the usurper had their functions ruined, and could no longer use their absolute authority to suppress the original order of this world. To continue to subdue and control the resentments and loathing of the world, the usurper and one who came after created the Gnoses together. So it came to be that an order was made to be upheld, and thus did humans come to only possess these seven remembrances, and all fragments of the primordial were driven to devour each other.\nFrom that day on, whenever a person's wishes reached the heavens, the seven overseers of the material realm were duty-bound to grant them a gift. Though they might know nothing of who or what wish had stepped into the threshold of the sacred, the Seven Archons still had to impart a shattered shard of their mastery to that person. And when one so gifted completed their duty... the gift the gods would receive in return would be more abundant still.\nNeuvillette obeys no edict from the heavens, but he does acknowledge human will. So he too set aside parts of himself, as like unto the dragon-treasure hoards of old, awaiting valiant humans to come and claim them. ｜ 那维莱特本身并不需要使用神之眼来驱动元素力量。只不过有些事情他也是在最后成为完全之体时才知晓的：\n在复仇的大战中受到重创，僭位者机能损毁，无力再凭借自己的绝对威权压制这个世界本来的秩序。为了镇压、调服世界的不甘与愤恨，僭位者与另一位后来者一同制造了「神之心」。世上应当建立起这样的秩序，人因此也只能拥有这七类念想。所有来自原初的碎片被驱使着互相吞并。\n在那以后，当人的渴望传达天上，七位物质世界的执政就应当为了他而献礼。尽管并不知晓究竟是何人或者何种愿望通达了神圣的境地，七神仍需分封出自身支配权的碎屑予其人。而当获取了赠礼的人完成使命之后…众神收到的回赠也会更加丰厚。\n那维莱特虽然并不听从天上的传谕，但是他认可人类的意义。他也献出了自己的一部分，就像是最传统的龙之宝藏一样，等待着勇敢的人前来领取。
- Talk to the strange shadow ｜ 与诡异的虚影对话
- How many secrets do these islands hold? ｜ 这片海岛上究竟有多少秘密？
- Flowing Rings ｜ 浮溯之珏
- Baharak ｜ 巴哈拉克
- Charged Attack DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param4:F1P}

- After her thesis is accepted, she has to stay with the Akademiya to do research work, so she can't come with us anymore. ｜ 她论文通过之后，就要留在教令院做研究了，当然不能跟着我们满世界跑。
- I heard that there was a huge, transparent ball of fire that used to burn... five hundred years ago? A thousand years ago? Maybe even further back than that. ｜ 叔叔听说，有一团巨大的透明的火，燃烧在过去五百年、一千年甚至更多不计其数的时间里。

- I see... understood. Thank you. ｜ 原来是这样…我明白了，谢谢你。

- ...Just leave, Cyno. This is a matter between us two old men. You're all too young to get involved. ｜ …回去吧，赛诺。老头子之间的事，跟你们年轻人无关。

- I'm listening. ｜ 说吧。
- An azure arrow fletching that has neither faded nor splintered with the passage of time. The sound of running water seems to linger around it. ｜ 青蓝色的箭羽，并未在漫长岁月中褪色破碎。似乎带来了落珠流水的琴声。

- Things in Sumeru have settled down now. Paimon bets people will be coming up with new and interesting ideas at this time. ｜ 说起来，须弥的风波已经告一段落了。这种时候，大家经常有奇思妙想呢。
- Haha, don't underestimate the hidden knowledge of the Knights of Favonius' Cavalry Captain! ｜ 哈哈，别小看西风骑士团骑兵队长的知识储备哦！
- I don't understand why people insist on going all out to try and prove how their existence is more valuable than everyone else's. To exist in the first place is a beautiful thing, and that's enough... isn't it? ｜ 为何人们总是拼命证明…自己的存在比其他人更有价值呢？存在本身，就是足够美好的事情了吧？

- Luckily, I found a nice, cozy cave, where I huddled up and slept for ages. When I woke back up again, the world seemed completely different. ｜ 幸好我找到一个暖和的山洞，趴在里面睡了很久。醒来世界好像都变得不一样啦。

- I'm listening. ｜ 请说~我在听着呢~

- Buffs:\nHydro DMG increased.\nThe Abyss Tumor can be effectively damaged now that you have been granted Mavuika's power.\n\nNotable Hazards:\nThe Abyss's influence has greatly increased the HP of monsters in the area.\nThe Abyss Tumor is shielded by Abyssal Pylon(s) that must first be destroyed. ｜ 增益效果：\n可造成的水元素伤害提升。\n在玛薇卡赋予的力量下，可对「深渊瘤石」产生有效攻击了。\n\n需要注意的危机：\n受到深渊力量的影响，此地魔物的生命值都得到了显著提高。\n「深渊界门」为「深渊瘤石」形成了坚实的护盾，需首先破坏「深渊界门」。
- A humanoid figurine ducking behind cover that can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nWhen danger approaches, residents of Constellation Metropole are said to use this method to conceal themselves, making it difficult for monsters to target them. Due to the widespread use of this concealment technique among the residents, it might be difficult for one to emerge as champion were a hide-and-seek competition to be held in the Metropole... ｜ 躲在掩体之后的人像模型，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n据说在危险来临之际，王城居民们就会使用这种方式隐藏身形，尽量让魔物找不到目标。由于这种隐蔽技巧在居民之中的广泛传播，倘若在星轨王城举办捉迷藏大赛的话，恐怕很难决出冠军…

- Of course, Lord Masahito tried to help us settle our emotions a little, and has assigned us garrison duties as a result. ｜ 虽然当时公子政仁大人也有意安抚我们的情绪，一直在这里进行以驻守为主的战略。
- You seem to have a keen interest in food. ｜ 你好像对吃的很感兴趣。
- You can't? That makes you weak, Pale Floater. Being compassionate is indeed one of the great Simurgh's many noble qualities, but one cannot survive here with merely a kind heart. ｜ 可怜？白飘飘还真是软弱，虽说慈悲是神鸟大人也拥有的高贵品德，不过光靠仁慈可是没办法在此地生存下去的。
- "Workers will be divided into three teams, each team working sixteen hours, rotating every two days. Teams with exceptional performance will receive extra grain provisions." ｜ 「将劳工划分为三队，每队工作十六小时，两日循环一次。表现卓越的小队将获得额外的谷物配给。」

- Talk with Azariq and Jeht ｜ 与阿萨里格和婕德对话
- Here, grab my arm, Lyney. I'll help you walk back. ｜ 我来扶着林尼哥哥吧。
- Don't be so formal, young lad! Your swordsman friend already paid for the damages. In fact, everyone was impressed by the skill displayed when you leaped onto the table and danced with greatsword in hand. We all eagerly await your next performance. ｜ 少年不必多礼，您的剑客朋友已付清所有赔偿了。顺便一提，客人以大剑狂舞餐桌的奇技令人大开眼界，希望下次能再度表演。
- Collect all treasure chests as stealthily as possible. ｜ 尽可能在不被发现的前提下收集所有宝物箱
- Very fun to be with. ｜ 很风趣。
- Sorush, what are you talking about? ｜ 咦，斯露莎在说什么呢？
- Fortunately, the Irodori Festival is proceeding smoothly. The Tri-Commission cooperated closely to prepare this festival, so at long last, I can take a break today. ｜ 不过所幸容彩祭一切顺利，三奉行在此次祭典上也合作顺畅，今天总算能稍作休息了。
- Is it just Paimon, or is the ground shaking!? ｜ 是我的错觉吗？你们有没有感觉到地面在震动？
- Rhodeia's Rage ｜ 洛蒂娅的愤怒
- Once a medium for the storage and transfer of wisdom in ancient times. Now, wisdom is found in ancient texts and in profound speech. Nevertheless, this Crown of Insight must still be able to impart some transcendent power and wisdom to its bearer. ｜ 远古时期，承载与传授智识所用的仪式器具。尽管如今，智慧居于言语及典籍中，但「智识之冕」中残存的力量与智慧仍能给如今的人们带来伟大的突破吧。

- Now that the Stormterror crisis has passed, it's clear skies above Mondstadt once again.\nHowever, the memory of facing Dvalin in the sky amidst the storms is ever so vivid.\nRelive your memories and once again partake in the battle. Maybe you'll learn something new. ｜ 如今风魔龙的危机已经解除，蒙德的天空终于放晴。\n但面对特瓦林，与暴风共舞的记忆再次鲜明地浮现。\n在回忆中重新演练这场战斗，或许能有新的收获…
- Well, you may have seen "scores" shaped like strings, but you have not seen those shaped like murals. One such is before you. ｜ 这样说来，你们虽然见过化形琴弦的「曲谱」，但还没见过壁画形式的「曲谱」呢，你面前的这个就是啦。

- But... Ah, you're back! How was it? Did you find the monster? ｜ 但是…咦，你回来了啊，怎么样，你找到那个怪物了吗？
- If you like the store, I'll keep it open forever, just for you. How 'bout that? ｜ 您要是喜欢我们店啊，我们这辈子都不关门儿！
- Tamimi had been operating beyond capacity for a century, and I'm unable to repair it with my current abilities, not even with these parts. It would thus be much better to use them to extend Karkata's lifespan. ｜ 经过百年的超载运转，就算留着这些部件，以我现在的能力，也修不好塔米米…不如让它的生命在卡卡塔身上延续。
- Although we managed to renovate the building's weathered exterior, restoring the lighthouse's heavily eroded foundation was a massive struggle... There was only so much we could do. ｜ 石材老化可以重建，地面严重老化翻修难度就大得多…改建起来难免有上限。

- So long as an <color=#FFD780FF>Exquisite Throw</color> is in play, your own active character deals 1% more DMG. This increases by a further 3.5% DMG every second. - The main courtyard gate of the Refined Estate, which derives its aesthetic from Inazuman traditional designs.\nThe vast majority of doors in Inazuma City are not particularly heavy. There is, after all, little need to beware of burglars if the city's security is excellent.\nAdult males inclined toward criminal acts tend to be of the particularly large and sturdy sort and have already been specially marked by the Shogunate for service as reserve troops, thus rendering them quite reluctant to act rashly. ｜ 「雅练上邸」的庭院正门，参考了稻妻建筑的传统设计。\n稻妻城中大多建筑的房门并不厚重，因为城内的治安情况较好，无须提防破门而入的盗贼。\n有着犯罪潜质的成年男子通常都身强力壮，这样的人早就被幕府登记在册，划入备选兵源并加以重点关注了，自然不敢轻举妄动。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Musou no Hitotachi is amazing!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> It can beat any enemy with a single slash!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Uh, but for Childe, it might need three slashes...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Y—Yeah!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Anyway, if you mastered that technique, Paimon wouldn't have to worry about you for the rest of our journey!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> So, where can one learn that technique?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Yeah, where can one learn that technique?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Hm?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Quit looking at Paimon like that! O—Okay, Paimon will keep an eye on you during our adventures... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>「无想的一刀」好厉害！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不管遇到什么敌人只要来一刀就行了吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…但是「公子」的话，可能要三刀…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>对、对哦！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>总之，如果你学会了的话，接下来的旅途我就再也不用担心你了！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那么，要去哪里才能学到呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那么，要去哪里才能学到呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不要这么看着我嘛！好、好嘛，接下来的旅途我也会多多关照你的…

- I was willing to play dumb and turn a blind eye, so we had a pleasant few days playing games together here. But once you started focusing on the "forbidden zone," all of that changed. ｜ 我本来睁一只眼闭一只眼，和你们相处还算愉快。但你们开始打「禁区」的主意，那就是另一回事。
- Don't mention it. This was a most rewarding adventure for us, too. ｜ 没关系，我们也收获了许多。
- Arana has been making friends with Nara in Avidya Forest and Ardravi Valley, so I haven't seen her for a long time. We heard her tune and thought that it was her. We were very happy. ｜ 兰拉娜一直在道成林、阿陀河谷，与那菈为友，老身已经许久未见到了。听见歌声，大家原本以为兰拉娜回来了，都很开心。
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- The "Diadem of Knowledge"... ｜ 「才识之冠」…
- I mean, at least I've met a leader who I can fully trust, you know? Captain Beidou will never lead us wrong. ｜ 最起码我遇到了一个可以全心信任的领导者，不是吗？北斗大人指的方向是绝对不会错的。
- Grand Bazaar Travel Guide ｜ 大巴扎游览指南
- But this admonishment is to prevent us from betraying the principles of research for monetary or other external reasons. ｜ 但这句话只是用来劝诫我们，在任何时候都不能因为钱财或其他外部原因而动摇研究的原则。
- Coordinates entered. ｜ 已录入坐标。
- What's made headlines today? Go to The Steambird and check it out! ｜ 今天的报纸上会写什么呢？到蒸汽鸟报社附近看看吧。
- Wonderful! It seems that Colonel Kate is still here. Let's go meet up with him. ｜ 太好了，看来凯特上校还在。去和他会合吧。
- Mysterious Letter ｜ 神秘的信笺
- What is that over there? ｜ 看那边，那是什么？
- We still have our reservations about your organization. ｜ 还不能完全相信你们。
- Open {param0} treasure chests in the Liffey Region and the Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering Region. ｜ 在黎翡区、枫丹动能工程科学研究院区开启{param0}个宝箱。
- She and Pierro were the first Harbingers I became acquainted with. Her prideful attitude when she first visited the House of the Hearth failed to earn her many friends among the children. Subsequent visits were accompanied by gifts and the stately claim that "those who dislike me shall receive none." The children quickly learned how to play pretend, and she in turn basked in their attention, superficial though it may have been. I imagine she quite enjoyed being surrounded by children, perhaps due to the persistent loneliness that plagued her... I found her sacrifice to be a great shame. May she be reunited with her lover in death. ｜ 她与皮耶罗是我最先认识的两位执行官。她第一次来壁炉之家做客，一副趾高气昂的做派，不受孩子们喜欢。那之后她每次来访都会带些礼物，堂而皇之地表示「不喜欢我的人没份」。为了礼物，孩子们很快学会了逢场作戏，她也照单全收。我猜测她很享受孩子们围在身旁的感觉，这或许源于她内心的孤独…对于她的牺牲，我深感遗憾，愿她能与死去的爱人重逢。
- Could you help me look for Schuster, Traveler? ｜ 旅行者，你能帮我去野外找找舒特吗？
- A crude wooden vessel filled only with memories. ｜ 木制的粗糙容器，其中空洞洞地盛满了回忆。
- Thanks for believing in me, you two. I've learned so much! ｜ 谢谢你们，你们总在鼓励我，教了我很多东西。
- <color=#f39001>{0}</color> additional DMG instance(s) will be dealt after a <color=#e09800>Roaring Rockbreaker</color> is triggered ｜ <color=#e09800>轰转磐岩</color>触发后将额外造成<color=#f39001>{0}</color>次伤害
- Tanger, in "Aranara and the Ill Little Fungus," it says that Aranara are very sensitive creatures. I don't think they'll show up if we stay here. ｜ 丹吉尔先生，《病蕈兽与兰那罗》里有说：兰那罗是非常敏感的生灵，如果我们一直在这里的话，他们很可能是不会靠近的。
- As long as we can still afford it, we won't give any young man to war. ｜ 只要我们还养得起，我们就不会在战争面前，放弃任何一个年轻人。
- Hehe, do you remember now? Anyway, you've come at a great time. Could I... ask you to help me with something? ｜ 嘿嘿，记起来了吗，你来得正好，我能不能…拜托你一件事…
- It really riled them up. They chased the funny-looking fellow as he fled, which brought them out into the open. ｜ 丘丘人一下子就炸了锅了，跟着那个逃跑的怪人就追了出来！
- From what I gathered about business in Aaru Village... I'd say that "selling more at a lower price point" is the way to go. ｜ 我了解过阿如村的生意市场…我的判断是，在那里卖东西，最好的方式就是「薄利多销」。
- Cat's Tail's reply ｜ 猫尾的回应
- This man's gone insane. There's no way we can communicate with him. ｜ 不行啊，这个人疯疯癫癫的，根本没法交流。
- Master looks a lot older than when I last saw him... I just hope he can hold on... ｜ 老师看起来…比以前更苍老了。希望他能撑得过去…
- Rumor has it that people who've ascended to Celestia have also witnessed the same helix-shaped divine ladder that can be seen within Visions. Venturing out into the universe and down into the abyss are the same in that both are braving the dark unknown. ｜ 相传通往天空岛之人，在神之眼中——在幻视中，看到的天梯也是如此螺旋的形态。我们走向宇宙，或者下到深渊。并没有差别，因为都是未知的漆黑。
- Fish ｜ 鱼
- "But we've been given a new opportunity by this peace, haven't we? I hear that Uyuu Restaurant is pretty famous around these parts. Let's go get a drink there some time." ｜ 「但和平总是新的机遇，听说稻妻的『乌有亭』很有名，有时间去喝一杯吧。」
- You and Chasca take Chuychu back to the Stadium. ｜ 与恰斯卡一同带葵可回到了竞技场。
- Oh, guess that makes sense... She does look kinda rough at the moment. ｜ 好吧，那也难怪，她的样子是有点不太妙。
- About the prophecy... ｜ 关于「预言」…
- I hope we can use that truth to save everybody. ｜ 但愿那个答案，可以拯救大家。
- *cough* Now, I am sure that there might be some early misunderstandings, but so long as we persevere and continue to improve on our work, I'm sure that they will someday be moved! ｜ 咳咳…一开始肯定会遭到误解，但是只要持之以恒，改进产品，肯定能打动他们的！
- When I went to get my documents processed, I specially mentioned that I was a registered researcher with the Akademiya, to be distinguished, of course, from folklorists or other such academic hobbyists. ｜ 我去办驻留手续的时候，特意提了我是在教令院有登记记录的学者，和普通的民间学术爱好者不同。
- Naturally. I can assure you of that. ｜ 那是自然，我可以向你担保。
- A mysterious and gargantuan creature from another world. ｜ 神秘的异界巨兽。
- Chicken-Mushroom Skewer. ｜ 野菇鸡肉串。
- Even when you put it that way, I still feel bad... ｜ 就算这么说，我还是觉得很对不起…
- Daddy said that Stormterror must have come because I wanted to climb up the god's statue... ｜ 爸爸说一定是诺拉那次想要爬到风神像上面，所以才引来了风魔龙…
- #Will we really be okay...? If anything weird jumps out at us, teach it a lesson, {NICKNAME}! ｜ 应该没事吧？要是有什么怪东西跳出来，我们就…嗯…把它教训一顿！

- So that's how it is... We'll help you out! ｜ 这样啊…嗯，我们会帮忙的！
- Yes, that's precisely it. That's why I wanted to find this book. That way, we, the Abyss Order, would have proof. Proof that the gods and Celestia came from beyond this world. ｜ 啊，是啊。所以我也想找到这本书。这样我们深渊教团就有实证了。「众神」和天空岛果然是外来之物。
- {0}+ ｜ {0}+
- My loyal subjects, I see your faces are filled with fear and trepidation at the vile and villainous evils that once again seek, albeit in vain, to disturb the peace and tranquility of our beloved Mondstadt. ｜ 我忠诚的臣属，看你一脸忧虑，想必是那些罪愆邪佞又一次妄图染指蒙德的安宁吧。
- Phonia ｜ 方妮雅
- Deals <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color> and sets up a General's War Banner.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>General's War Banner</color>\nProvides up to 3 buffs to active characters within the skill's AoE based on the number of <color=#FFE699FF>Geo</color> characters in the party at the time of casting:\n· 1 Geo character: Adds "Standing Firm" - DEF Bonus.\n· 2 Geo characters: Adds "Impregnable" - Increased resistance to interruption.\n· 3 Geo characters: Adds "Crunch" - <color=#FFE699FF>Geo DMG Bonus</color>.\n\nGorou can deploy only 1 General's War Banner on the field at any one time. Characters can only benefit from 1 General's War Banner at a time. When a party member leaves the field, the active buff will last for 2s.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>\nAdjust the location of the skill.\n\n<i>"Take up this formation and we'll be safe — I guarantee it!" As a general and a leader of troops, the last thing Gorou wants is to see is those who follow him getting hurt.</i> ｜ 造成<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素范围伤害</color>，并立起大将旗指物。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>大将旗指物</color>\n依据施放时队伍中元素类型为<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素</color>的角色数量，为其领域内的当前场上角色赋予如下效果：\n·一名角色时：「坚牢」：防御力提升；\n·二名角色时：「难破」：除上述效果外，提升抗打断能力；\n·三名角色时：「摧碎」：除上述效果外，获得<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素伤害加成</color>。\n\n同时只能存在一个由五郎自己创造的大将旗指物；角色只能获得一个大将旗指物提供的效果。角色离开领域后，领域的效果将持续2秒。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n可以调整技能生效位置。\n\n<i>「只要进入此阵中，便能保证性命安全无虞！」无论何时何地，作为领军的大将，五郎最不希望看到的就是跟随其身后的同伴受到伤害吧。</i>
- ... *sigh* ｜ …唉。
- Could I have your name? ｜ 你是…
- A seed obtained from the Seed Dispensary. A quality seed full of life, just waiting to be planted in the fields of the Realm Within. After some time, it will grow into a Brilliant Chrysanthemum. ｜ 通过「化种匣」获取的种子，富有活力，品质上佳，种植于壶中洞天的田亩后，可在一段时间后生长为「灼灼彩菊」。
- In the aftermath of the collision between the Jade Chamber and That Which Lies in the Deep, the sea remains dotted with floating fragments of the Jade Chamber. The Millelith soldier Kun is currently looking for help with the cleanup work... ｜ 在群玉阁撞击了那个海里的东西后，海上还零星地飘着群玉阁的碎片，千岩军大坤正在找人来清理这些碎片…

- Just how many were...? Actually... Ugh, forget it. It's fine... ｜ 到底放了多少张啊…其实…唉，算了，没事…
- Amber! Mon-Mon's amber! ｜ 琥珀——！理理真琥珀——！
- The <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C114102]</color> summoned by your $[A1410] who has this card equipped heals 1 more HP when healing characters with no more than 6 HP, and increases the amount of $[K310] gained by characters with no $[K310] by 1 when $[K310] is gained. ｜ 装备有此牌的$[A1410]所召唤的<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C114102]</color>，对生命值不多于6的角色造成的治疗+1，使没有$[K310]的角色获得$[K310]时获得量+1。
- #Let's try playing the Ancient Zither here, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，在这里弹琴试试吧。
- There is a saying in Teyvat that has obscure origins and is often used by people who are feeling extremely ashamed or embarrassed:\n"I just wanted the tree to open up and swallow me."\nCollei was pacing in the woods while murmuring the sentence, which she had just learned from a book.\nBefore she returned to Sumeru, she had promised a dear friend that she would become an excellent doctor with exceptional medical skills so as to save people like her who were in constant agony, both physically and mentally.\nHowever, it takes only a passing passion to make a wish, and yet it requires years of painstaking training to realize it. In the examination that had just concluded, Collei had hit the barrier between reality and expectations once more.\n"Ugh... How am I supposed to tell Amber about this..."\nPlus, she would have to ask her master to write the letter for her. Things like doing poorly on the test and wanting to have someone to talk to were not things she could easily speak out in front of her master, either.\nIt just so happened that a tree hollow, roughly the size of a person, appeared along her patrol route, as if some god had overheard her mumblings.\n"Wait, wait... Talking to Aranara about my problems... I mean, I've read about it in the books, but they were children's books! I'm sure I've outgrown that... But now that there's no one around..."\nBefore she knew it, she was already crouching in said hollow.\nThe darkness turned into a solid fortress, isolating Collei from all kinds of pressure.\nCollei, being an introvert by nature, found it difficult to present herself impeccably. No matter how hard she strove to be as outgoing and sunny as Amber, she could never manage to ignore her weariness and loneliness.\nThus did Collei vent her distress to that hollow, emptying herself of all the negativity she had accumulated after getting back to Sumeru.\n"Did Collei go on patrol in that area again?"\nA few days later, Tighnari checked on Collei's recent forest patrol routes, which she had been taking all too frequently, before looking at her test papers, which featured remarkably higher scores. He could not help but think to himself:\n"Did she find a way to improve her grades in the forest? Well, that's not bad either way. Alright, I'll save that patrol route for her and leave her be for the time being. I'll have other Rangers take the other routes." ｜ 提瓦特有句俗语，来源已不可考，多用于描述羞惭难当的心境：\n「——真想找个树洞钻进去。」\n柯莱在林中一边踱步，一边念叨刚从书上学来的句子。\n回到须弥前，她曾向一位朋友许下诺言，发誓要学会精妙的医术，将来去救治更多与她一样深陷病痛与绝望的人。\n然而许下愿望只需一时热情，实现愿望却要历经多年苦读。就在刚刚结束的测试里，柯莱再次撞上了现实与愿望间的壁垒。\n「这种事情…实在没办法跟安柏说啊。」\n而且，眼下要是想给故友写信，还必须请师父代笔。考得不好想找人倾诉之类的事，在师父面前又怎么说得出口？\n好巧不巧恰逢其会，一个一人大小的树洞出现在巡林路线上，巧得像是神明刚好垂听到了柯莱的碎碎念。\n「不不，虽然童话书里也写过跟兰那罗倾诉的事，但我早就过了那个年纪了…啊，不过，周围没什么人…」\n回过神来，柯莱已经抱头蹲坐在树洞里。\n黑暗仿佛坚实的堡垒，将种种现实压力隔绝在外。\n柯莱性格内向，很难做到八面玲珑。尽管她想模仿安柏成为阳光的人，也实在没法视困顿与落寞为无物。\n苦恼的柯莱对树洞说了许多话，暴风骤雨般，把回须弥后积压的一切压力都吐了个干净。\n「柯莱那家伙，又到那一带去巡逻了吗？」\n几天后，提纳里看着柯莱近日频繁往返的巡林路线，又看了看她进步明显的试卷，陷入沉思。\n「是在树林里找到了提升成绩的办法？嗯，也好，那就让其他巡林员走别的路线，暂时不打扰她了。」
- Update Notice ｜ 更新通知
- If you need any help, you can always ask your fellow alliance members. ｜ 如果有需要帮助的事，随时可以找联盟成员。
- A Chance Meeting ｜ 偶遇
- Ah, it was nothing. I'm just glad to be able to help. How are things on your end? Did you find the cannonballs? ｜ 没什么的，能帮上忙就好…你们这边怎么样？炮弹找到了吗？
- I couldn't give you a number, but the pay will be good enough, I'm sure. ｜ 那我可说不准，但是…一定会是一笔足够让你满意的报酬。
- The Fungi who stay at the campsite will get worried if we're away for too long. ｜ 如果离开营地太久，留守的蕈兽伙伴们会担心的。
- Of course. I am a most generous master, after all. But only if you can finish it all. Wasting food simply will not do. ｜ 当然，师父是很大方的。不过前提是你们吃得完，浪费食物可不好。
- Paimon thinks she's forgotten about us... ｜ 我们很自然地被忽略了…

- Yup yup! Time for the next phase of our journey to start for real! ｜ 对啊，这么快就来了，开启我们新的旅途的「那个」。
- But the question is... Do we think he was only saving animals? ｜ 照这样想，它所救下来的，就只是些小动物吗？
- Surrender? Impossible!\nAt this very moment, the man holding a barbed spear looks surprisingly calm and determined.\n"I am Zaemon! The Deathless Oni of Seirai!"\n"I am a proud seaman, and I will never live in the mercy of my enemy!" ｜ 投降？怎么可能！！\n手持倒钩刺枪的男人，此刻眼中竟出奇冷静与坚定。\n「我可是左卫门！我可是清籁的不死之鬼！」\n「我乃堂堂海上男儿，从不苟活于敌人的慈悲！」
- Are you curious about us Melusines, dear passenger? Mm-hmm, I get it — they say that there aren't any Melusines anywhere else in Teyvat, after all! ｜ 嗯？莫非乘客您是对我们「美露莘」好奇吗？嗯嗯，可以理解！听说在提瓦特别的地方都没有美露莘呢！
- It must be said, though, that there can be no complaints about his coffee-making skills. Quitting his old job to run this place has been one of the best decisions of his life. ｜ 我得说，他调制咖啡的手艺无可挑剔，辞职来开咖啡厅是他这辈子做过的最正确的决定之一了。
- Okay... then... until next time, Cater! ｜ 嗯…卡特哥哥，那就…下次见！
