- Yes, that's the conclusion I came to as well. It's the only thing that could explain the fear. ｜ 嗯，这也是我的推断，不然只是一顶帽子，不可能让人惶恐成那副样子。
- #It's fine. ...Look, how about we make a deal: After you find your {F#brother}{M#sister}, tell {F#him}{M#her} to come to Naganohara Fireworks for all {F#his}{M#her} fireworks needs. That way, I'll get another customer. Sound fair? ｜ #别在意，不用这么客气。那这样吧，作为交换，等你找到了亲人，你要把「长野原烟花店」介绍给{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_SHE|INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE]}，这样我又能多一个客人了。
- *sigh* I would happily do it myself, but at my age my strength is not what it used to be... For a youngster like you, this should be no problem. Come on, make an old man's day. ｜ 唉，本来说我自己来也行…但是老头子我真的动不了了，年轻人，你就帮帮我吧。
- Originally, I'd only intended to say goodbye to Kuntira and make peace with some parts of my life. ｜ 其实此前一个人回到这里，原本只是想要向「昆谛罗」…和自己的一些心事道别。

- You and Paimon enjoy the exquisite tea that Xianyun has prepared. You find your spirits lifted and your fatigue dispelled by the drink... ｜ 和派蒙一同享用了闲云烹煮的好茶，只觉心旷神怡，疲惫一扫而空…

- Venti? The bard that sits around doing nothing all day? What's so interesting about him? Sure, I guess I can take a look...\nHuh, that's weird, the scryglass, it's... I can't see a thing... this wind... I can't... open my eyes! No, my hat! Ah! My clothes, stop! The wind's going to strip all my clothes off! Make it stop, make it stop! ...Alright, alright! I'll never do this again! ｜ 温迪？那个成天无所事事的吟游诗人？咦，他有什么有趣的吗？我占卜看看…\n咦，水占盘怎么…什么也看不清，怎，怎么起风了，眼睛都睁不开了！我的帽子！衣服，衣服要被吹跑了！停下来！我不干了！我不干了！

- A counter made from birchwood that can be seen in many a store or guesthouse.\nAs these counters can be quite tall, some caring store owners will set up stools for more vertically challenged employees. Employees who do not receive such care, however, will have to fend for themselves in this regard. ｜ 以「桦木」制作的柜台，可见于各式店铺和酒馆。\n因为这种柜台略为高大。某些店长会在柜台后方设置垫脚凳，照顾一些身高不足的店员。而另一些没有这种店长照顾的店员，就只能自己想办法了。
- Strange. Why did that word suddenly leave my lips? It's as if it was my hometown, where my family is. ｜ 奇怪，我的嘴里为什么会冒出「卡皮托利姆」，好像这是我的故乡，家人也都在这里一样。
- That's the answer to your problem, kid. And when you realize that, you'll stop having such high expectations. Then, you'll be a kid with answers, not problems. ｜ 小鬼，这就是问题的答案，等你理解了，你就不会再对谁失望了。你就会从问题小孩变成答案小孩！

- Heightened Verve lasts for 30s:\nCharacters gain 50% Pyro/Electro DMG Bonus. When a character triggers a Pyro or Electro-related reaction on an opponent, a Cyclone will be created at the opponent's location, pulling in nearby opponents. The Cyclone lasts for 5s. This effect can be triggered once every 6s.\nWhile Heightened Verve is active, different opponent types will spawn, and defeating them will net you more points. ｜ 「锐意」持续30秒：\n角色获得50%火元素/雷元素伤害加成；角色对敌人触发火元素/雷元素相关反应时，将在敌人的位置生成一枚风之眼，持续牵引附近的敌人，风之眼持续5秒，此效果每6秒至多触发一次。\n「锐意」持续期间，出现的敌人类型将发生变化，击败这些敌人可以获得更高的评分。

- How unexpected... ｜ 没想到是这样…
- The thing is, Jean knows all of us so well now... ｜ 你说这个啊，毕竟我们已经和琴那么熟了…
- The ingredients are... Ugh... Totally unintelligible... ｜ 这里写的药材是…呃…真是难读…
- Well, usually, you'd pull out your sword and "swish," vaporize them all in one go, no? ｜ 一般来说你应该会更干净利落地拔刀，「唰」的一下粉碎它们吧？

- There's no way Auntie would let Nechca plunge into the river of memories without any tools — she'd only be overwhelmed by the surge of memories. ｜ 婶婶也绝不可能让妮赫佳不借助任何工具，直接涉入回忆的江河，这样的话，妮赫佳只会被那些回忆冲垮。

- After a moment, he'd start to smile. It really surprised me at the time... My guess is that the names on the handle were of important people to him. ｜ 不一会儿，他就开始笑，吓了我一跳。我猜，对他来说那应该是很重要的人的名字吧。

- Sure. ｜ 可以哦。

- Rawr... Rawr? ｜ 呀…嗯？
- Ooh, this is great! ｜ 真好吃！
- A flower carved from grey stone covered with gold foil. Legends say that during a war, it was used to differentiate friend from foe. ｜ 由灰石雕刻并巧贴金箔的花，传说在一场战争中，曾作为敌我双方区别的凭证。
- Don't like... Plant... Invasion. ｜ 植物。入侵。讨厌。

- "Steadfast" describes its tenacity, "Berserker" praises its strength, and "Strongest" reflects my utmost faith in its abilities. ｜ 「坚毅」是指它的强韧，「狂战士」是指它的力道，而「无可匹敌」，则是它在我心中的地位。

- And you are... ｜ 你是…
- Accidentally Aground ｜ 意外触礁
- Barbara has never once considered giving up.\nHer determination and resilience even surprised her father, Seamus Pegg, the Cardinal of Daybreak.\nBarbara only allows herself to be depressed for 30 seconds.\nAfter that, she forces herself to brighten up, no matter what.\n"I'm not so good in combat, so I'll be sure to support those who are."\nUnder her father's counsel, Barbara became a healer.\nShe is as radiant as the sick and injured are pained.\nHer desire to be recognized gradually transformed into a simple desire to help others. ｜ 芭芭拉没有想过放弃。\n不如说，她的韧性令她的父亲，「拂晓的枢机卿」西蒙都感到吃惊。\n芭芭拉给自己制定的「失落时间」只有三十秒。\n三十秒过后，无论如何都要重新打起精神来。\n「既然不擅长战斗，那我就负责后勤吧！」\n在父亲的引导下，芭芭拉成为了一位治疗者。\n伤员和病患是如此痛苦，芭芭拉的善良又是如此闪耀。\n「想获得他人认可」的渴望，不知不觉地变成了「想帮助他人」的简单信念。

- Zhiyi's manifesto covers a huge range of topics. Looking for details that don't add up will be like trying to find a needle in a haystack. ｜ 知易的规划条目众多，想要短时间内找出其中的破绽并非易事。
- "Luckily, there is still time left for me to take care of everything before I leave." ｜ 「所幸，还有一点空闲，足够我在离开前收拾好一切。」

- Long-Necked Rhinos seem to have been spotted in this area... ｜ 附近似乎有长颈角犀出没…
- If I really needed an assistant, it would be better to just take a trip to Fontaine and recruit some staff member from The Steambird or find a Melusine who can use a typewriter and bring them back to Mondstadt... ｜ 需要写稿的助手，不如再去趟枫丹，说服某位蒸汽鸟报的文员，或者找一位会用打字机的美露莘来蒙德…

- Aranakin ｜ 兰纳真

- The first Windmuster Iris explosion in each <color=#FFD780FF>Windmuster Kick</color> will regenerate 9 Elemental Energy for Shikanoin Heizou. Every subsequent explosion in that Windmuster Kick will each regenerate an additional 1.5 Energy for Heizou.\nOne <color=#FFD780FF>Windmuster Kick</color> can regenerate a total of 13.5 Energy for Heizou in this manner. ｜ 在一次<color=#FFD780FF>聚风蹴</color>中，「聚风真眼」在第一次爆发后，将为鹿野院平藏恢复9点元素能量，此后每次爆发，都将分别为鹿野院平藏额外恢复1.5点元素能量，\n一次<color=#FFD780FF>聚风蹴</color>，至多通过这种方式为鹿野院平藏恢复13.5点元素能量。
- Thank you, that gives me hope. ｜ 嗯，承你吉言。

- You might as well just accept the lift. If I let you walk, who knows how long it'll take us! And if anything happens to you, then I'd really never hear the end of it from your father. ｜ 别纠结了小姐，要是让你走路去，还不知道要走到几点！到时候，我们回家就真没办法跟老爷交待了。
- Oh. Is that true? ｜ 是，是这样吗？
- Ah, makes sense! Spoken like a seasoned shogun. ｜ 哦！影不愧是身经百战的大将军呢！

- By the time this all dawned on me, I realized that my life has already been filled to the brim by trifling matters, and I have no more freedom. ｜ 意识到这一切的时候，我发现自己的生活已经被琐碎填满，一点自由空间都没有了。
- Items from the Jade Chamber have been scattered across the seas to the east of Liyue Harbor. The nearby Treasure Hoarders, smelling opportunities for loot, have made their move. Board your Waverider and wipe out any Treasure Hoarder interference to your salvaging operations! ｜ 群玉阁的藏品零星散落在璃月港以东的海面上，附近的盗宝团已闻风而动。尽快驾驭「浪船」，排除盗宝团的干扰，夺回群玉阁的藏品吧！
- He's like that to others, and worse when it comes to himself. ｜ 对别人是这样，对他自己更是。

- The point is that you stepped up when the time came. ｜ 关键在于你挺身而出了。
- If you find out anything at all, come and find me. ｜ 嗯，最近如果有什么发现，欢迎随时来找我。
- Hmm... I promised to take you out for some Sticky Honey Roast, didn't I? Before everyone got caught up in the Stormterror crisis. ｜ 对了！我记得之前有过约定，要请你们吃「蜜酱胡萝卜煎肉」的，可后来一直在忙龙灾的事…

- Based on a given line of poetry, you must create the second line to form a pair, or "couplet"! As long as you take inspiration from the wide world around you, you'll find it's not so difficult after all. ｜ 依据已有的上句，创作诗歌的下句。只要从身边事物出发得到灵感，就一点不难。
- ... ｜ ……
- During our training, we often set up obstacles on both sides of this stream and have Sayu make her way up the course. ｜ 训练的时候，我们就会在这条溪流的两侧安排障碍，让早柚从下面跑上去。

- A heavily armed ship of unknown origins has stopped outside Guyun Stone Forest. You hop right on board to investigate... ｜ 在孤云阁旁，停着一艘不知来历的庞大武装舰船，而你却冒冒失失地闯了进去…
- SWORDFISH II ｜ SWORDFISH Ⅱ
- Companion: Role Reprisal ｜ 伙伴·特别重演
- As expected, Dehya also didn't get hurt today. ｜ 今天的迪希雅果然也没有受伤呢。
- Ugh fine, let's go take a look then. ｜ 好吧，那我们去看看。
- She has sought to reclaim her adeptus side since returning to Jueyun Karst. At her behest, one has organized training for her to achieve that end... ｜ 她回绝云间以后，一直想要找回身为仙人的感觉，所以提出要我给她安排仙人的修行…
- Inazuman Workshop: Sweetness Sought ｜ 稻妻工坊-「粝食寻甘」
- Can you tell us more about the Oracle? ｜ 能具体讲讲「神谕」的事吗？
- So, tell us about your impudent friend... ｜ 关于你那个没礼貌的朋友…
- Lulu, I've been the captain loads of times in a row now, we should let Fei have a turn. ｜ 璐璐，我已经连着好几天做船长了，也该阿飞扮了…
- Sir, this traveler actually is... ｜ 长官，这位旅行者其实…
- I'd be overjoyed if the people here could find it in their hearts to forgive me. But they're more likely to unleash a tirade of vitriol against me, which of course I completely understand and accept. ｜ 如果这里的人愿意原谅我，那我会很开心，但他们如果暴言相向，我也会全盘接受。
- When you think about it like that, the Holy Blade must've been very important. ｜ 唔…这样看来，这个水仙十字圣剑应该是很重要的东西。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- What about the operation that's happening on Watatsumi Island? ｜ 海祇岛那边怎么样了？
- <color=#00E1FFFF>The elevator will descend to the ground. Get on top of it before it starts ascending again to reach the dome.</color> ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>升降机会降到地面，赶在它重新上升前跃至其顶部，即可抵达穹顶。</color>
- Luhua Pool ｜ 渌华池
- No matter whether you're a mercenary or a guard, you will always wind up coming across situations in which retreat is the best option. ｜ 无论是佣兵还是守卫，在执行任务的时候，都会遇见某些必须先行撤退的情况。
- But I never thought that... *sigh* Please, help me get my map and Adventurer Handbook back. ｜ 但是没想到…唉，请你帮我把地图和冒险之证拿回来吧。
- Iaune doesn't know what the point of his work is. ｜ 艾尤恩不知道工作的意义何在。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Let's begin with your manner of speech. Aristocrats have a very unique way of carrying conversation, even with mundane daily topics. ｜ 先从谈吐开始，即便是在种种日常场合，贵族也有很独特的对话方式。
- Sadly, the Jade Chamber, which once blotted out the sun and moon, has now been swallowed up by the waves of the Sea of Clouds. ｜ …昔日遮天掩月的「群玉阁」，如今已被云来海的重重波涛湮没了。
- After a <color=#e09800>Stoneshard Strike</color> hits an opponent, that opponent's Geo and Pyro RES is decreased by <color=#f39001>{1}%</color> ｜ <color=#e09800>岩晶破袭</color>命中敌人后，该敌人的岩元素和火元素抗性降低<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>

- Yeah. All three of us together makes a pretty smart group! ｜ 就是，我们三个人加起来还是很厉害的！
- Come on. Let's go down to the river. ｜ 走吧，我们去河边看看情况。
- Perform a powerful strike that deals a considerable amount of Physical DMG to the opponent nearby. ｜ 挥出满聚锐气的一击，对附近的对手造成可观的物理伤害。

Deals <color=#80FFD7FF>AoE Anemo DMG</color> upon impact with the ground. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多三段攻击，造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，短暂咏唱后，造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n凝聚风元素的力量，从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素范围伤害</color>。

- Fortunately, Hu Tao treats the parlor's operations with the utmost importance and is always looking to grow her business.\n"At the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, the living give us Mora to see the dead on their way. We have a responsibility to both parties, so we gotta make sure both sides are happy."\nWhen it comes to the parlor's rules, Hu Tao knows them all like the back of her hand.\nEach day when the parlor closes its doors, Hu Tao invites consultants from different walks of life to pass their teachings on to the undertakers.\n"The funeral tradition is like science. It cannot be performed based on impressions and personal habits."\nOf all the lecturers, Zhongli is the most revered one. As such, his lessons have proven to be the most effective in cultivating the competence of Wangsheng Funeral Parlor's undertakers.\nDespite often being teased by Hu Tao due to his old-fashioned style, he is also the person that she trusts the most.\nApart from that, Hu Tao always instructs her undertakers to respect their clients' wishes and not insist on any particular form of funeral.\n"Some clients want nothing more than a peaceful ceremony, some opt for a more lively style of event. There are also wealthier clients who would request a funeral arrangement of the most pompous kind. The services we provide have to be tailor-made according to the clients' needs."\nEver since Hu Tao took over, the parlor's operations have been solid and reliable, with ceremonies conducted so tactfully that quite a few superstitious people in Liyue have changed their attitudes towards funerals.\nEven so, Hu Tao still has a tendency to wander off, disappearing as soon as her undertakers are busy listening to lectures.\nThe hobbies and interests of this young director are just as eccentric as her personality, and yet it is difficult to say with certainty if those activities are of a purely leisurely nature.\nHu Tao's shadow can be seen in the moonlit docks or at the highest, most precarious viewpoints in the mountains, where she's likely to take in the scenery and shape her thoughts into beautiful poetry.\nShe loves to roam freely at night, looking for inspiration. When it strikes her, no matter where she is, she cannot help but compose a poem on the spot.\nIf they are particularly lucky, the traveling merchants taking respite around the Huaguang Stone Forest can spot a mysterious girl keeping herself amused in solitude.\nHu Tao can play a four-player card game accompanied by no one for hours on end.\nThat said, the joys of engaging in such activities remain a mystery to all but Hu Tao herself. ｜ 好在胡桃对生意尤为重视，从不轻慢。\n「咱们往生堂啊，收活人的钱，送死人上路，肩负双倍的责任，须让阴阳两界的人满意。」\n说起堂里规矩，胡桃总是头头是道。\n每到白天闭门停业，胡桃便邀请各路博学客卿来为年轻仪倌们说书讲学。\n「葬仪传统是一门大学问，不可依赖印象和习惯。」\n诸位讲师中，钟离先生最受敬仰。他的讲学成效显著，大大提升了往生堂仪倌的素养。\n即使胡桃常常调侃钟离的古板作风，他仍是最受胡桃信赖之人。\n此外，胡桃也要求仪倌们重视客户需求，不应拘泥于某种特定丧葬形式。\n「客人们各有要求，有些想让逝者走得清净，有些追求热闹喜丧，还有些富贵人家，下葬只讲求一个排场。我们做什么、如何做，理应取决于他们要什么。」\n胡桃主掌事务后，往生堂经营稳定，施礼得当，甚至令不少忌讳白事的璃月居民对丧葬一事有所改观。\n话虽如此，仪倌们受训时，胡桃倒是另有去处，一溜烟便跑得没影。\n这位堂主的兴趣爱好极富个人特色，又很难说是否太有闲情。\n月下码头，山间危楼，最高处那个背手而立出口成诗的身影必定是胡桃。\n她酷爱在夜晚闲逛，只要兴致来了，无论身处何处，总会情不自禁地赋诗一首。\n而途经华光林山间歇脚亭的商贾，或许会有幸见到一位独坐桌边自娱自乐的神秘少女。\n四个人才能组成的牌局，胡桃自己和自己都能玩得停不下来。\n至于其中乐趣…唯有她自己知道。

- When character HP falls below 70%, their ATK increases by 5%, and Normal and Charged Attacks that hit an opponent unleash a shockwave. Shockwaves can be unleashed this way once every 5s. Following this, every loss of 10% of HP will result in 5% increased ATK. A maximum of 25% ATK can be gained in this way. Conversely, the ATK of characters at above 70% HP is decreased by: ｜ 角色的生命值低于70%时，攻击力提升5%，并在普通攻击或重击命中时会释放冲击波，每5秒通过这种方式至多释放一次冲击波。此后生命值每降低10%，就会获得5%攻击力提升。通过这种方式，至多获得25%攻击力提升；相反，角色的生命值高于70%时，攻击力降低

- Fontaine Fashion Week has finally kicked off!\nNavia and Kirara took to the stage from on high, drawing eyes and gasps as they descended downward on an opened umbrella, with Lyney and Lynette following behind.\nAs Navia introduced the "Chioriya" brand, the designer herself arrived at the venue in the nick of time.\nBathed in the light of the stage, the four of them changed into splendid outfits in the blink of an eye, as if by magic.\nChiori strode onto the stage as the audience gasped, confidently proclaiming her design philosophy to all.\nOnly those who refuse to surrender to setbacks on the road to achieving their dreams are worthy of the "Chioriya" brand. ｜ 枫丹时装周终于开幕。\n娜维娅和绮良良从高处登场，打伞跳下落到了展台上，吸引了所有人的目光。林尼和琳妮特出现在她们身后。\n伴随着娜维娅对「千织」品牌的介绍，千织也及时地赶到了现场。\n灯光就绪，四人仿佛变魔术一般，转眼之间换上了华丽的衣装。\n观众惊呼，千织也走上台，自信地向所有人宣告自己的设计理念。\n只有那些不向梦想道路上的阻挠认输的人，才配得上「千织」这个品牌。

- When the catch wasn't good, we'd all go hungry. The poor kids were crying all day and night, but there was just nothing I could do. ｜ 有的时候收获不佳，大家都吃不饱。小孩子没日没夜地哭闹，我却一点办法都没有。

- Okay, now Paimon's feeling hungry. We can worry about all this later — right now, it's time to get some grub. ｜ 说得我都饿了，之后的事就之后再担心吧！我们还是先找点吃的…

- The most valuable intel always comes after nightfall. They are like small, remote islands in the middle of the sea... if you don't stay vigilant, you will pass right by them in the fog. ｜ 有价值的情报往往在天黑以后才露面，它们仿佛海上的孤岛，要是不打起精神，你就会在迷雾中与之擦身而过。

- This stone gateway is round like the full moon, and similar designs are seen in some courtyards in Chenyu Vale.\nIt is said that the artisans of Liyue like to use the technique of borrowing scenery and allowing it to leak through to create an artistic conception of the beauty of a secluded, winding path. Skilled artisans will use such a full moon door as a canvas for a fan painting, using it to create a painted landscape that changes with every step. Therefore, should you be fortunate enough to pass by such a door in such a courtyard, consider slowing your steps while passing by. ｜ 石质的圆形过径门，形如满月，与沉玉谷内某些庭院所用之门的形制相同。\n据说，璃月的匠师们多喜欢用借景漏景等手法，来塑造曲径通幽的意境美。技艺高超的匠师们甚至可以将圆形的月洞门当做纨扇画的画布，利用其作画造景，创造出步移景异的视觉效果。因此若有幸受邀参观庭院的话，不妨在这样的门前放慢一下脚步吧。
- Maynar... Where's Maynar? ｜ 麦娜尔，麦娜尔呢？

- Fair, but there's no need to be so formal. ｜ 请不必多礼。
- Energy Cost|{param6:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param6:I}
- Oh? So there are rumors that I can overpower my Tenryou colleagues without even using my Vision? Hehe, well, let me set the record straight. One: Although I am technically a Doushin, I'm strictly a detective. My mind is my greatest tool, not my muscles. Two: It's not like my colleagues and I are getting into fights with each other all the time. And three... *sigh* Alright, seems like there's no fooling you. Just... never mind then, okay? ｜ 有传言说我不用神之眼也能放倒同僚？唔…我更正一下。第一，我虽然是奉行所同心，但也只是个侦探，动的是脑力。第二，我们平时是不会打架的。第三…欸，蒙不过你啊。那算了~

- Stone carvings shaped like war drums with exquisite carved patterns that can be found throughout Chenyu Vale.\nIt is said that these stone carvings originated from the war drums used by the Millelith. Hundreds of years ago, the Millelith would use such drums while doing battle with evil spirits in various places across Liyue. After immigrants from Liyue Harbor had settled in Chenyu Vale for some time, the idea that "war drums can exorcise evil, guard the home, and deter evil spirits" spread and took root, and the custom of placing war drums at the entrance to the home for protection became commonplace. Over time, this tradition evolved into the current practice of stone drums being used as guardians. ｜ 形似战鼓的石雕，表面饰有精美的花纹，能在沉玉谷各处见到。\n据传，这些石雕是从千岩军所用的战鼓演变而来。数百年前，千岩军正是击打着这样的战鼓，在璃月各地与妖祟作战。而璃月港本地来到沉玉谷的人们长久定居后，「战鼓具有着驱邪镇宅和威慑妖祟的功用」这一说法逐渐流传开来，沉玉谷出现了将战鼓摆放在家门口镇宅的习俗，并随着时间的推移，演变成了现在的镇宅鼓石。

- Ah... back when Beidou and I were carrying out ambushes against the Shogun's Army together, I raised my concerns that the enemy might detect our approach. But Beidou assured me of her fleet's unwavering discipline, and that raids could be carried out without detection. In the end, she was right, and that's exactly what happened. Now, every time the Watatsumi fleet encounters some sort of bottleneck, I consider inviting her to come and give them her instruction. There's no doubt, she runs a tight ship... ｜ 当时与北斗一同伏击幕府军的时候，我也曾提出过「担心幕府军事先察觉」的担忧。不过北斗对我说，她的船队令行禁止，能够悄无声息地发动奇袭，事实证明果然如此。如今我们海祇岛的船队在训练时遇到了瓶颈，我倒真想请她来指导一番…

- A rare and valuable butterflyfish variant from Inazuma. It loves water bodies suffused with Electro, and seems to derive joy from electric currents.\nIt is said that these fish were once from the same line as the Abiding Angelfish of Liyue, until traveling merchants exported them to Inazuma. There, their behavioral patterns underwent an unexpected shift. At present, some researchers have begun to use them in conjunction with Electro Slimes for experiments.\n"Ma... Mah... Mah tung ith numm..." — A certain greedy gourmet after trying a Raimei Angelfish dish. ｜ 生活在稻妻的珍稀蝶鱼，喜好雷元素聚集的水域，似乎能从电流中攫取欢愉。\n相传原本与生活在璃月的「长生仙」源出一脉，直到被旅行商人引入稻妻后，生态上发生了意想不到的变化。就目前而言，已经有学者利用它们与雷史莱姆进行通电研究了。\n「麻...麻...舌陀...麻噜...」——某位贪食了「雷鸣仙」料理的老饕。
- Compendium of Misery ｜ 不幸的总集
- You've seen me at full speed. When I go all out, no monster can catch me. ｜ 你见识过我的速度，只要我愿意，没有怪物能追上我。
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- I did consider a battle of the bards... ｜ 本想找他一决胜负把听众抢回来的…
- ... ｜ ……
- Oh, yes of course... I mean, I do hope to carry on doing business in Liyue in the future. ｜ 那、那当然了…我还想继续在璃月做生意呢。
- As you piece together the trail of clues, it brings you closer and closer to the culprit... and then, that moment when you finally put the last piece of the puzzle into place... I always get such a sense of accomplishment. It's exhilarating! ｜ 把线索串联起来，一步步找出真凶，直到亲手为拼图嵌上最后一块。那种成就感，哎呀呀，实在是太迷人了。
- Yes. ｜ 是的。
- Complete Denying Decay: II ｜ 完成除衰·之二
- So you really are considering it! ｜ 认真地考虑起来了！
- Urgh... ｜ 呃啊…
- You don't wanna get on the wrong side of my boss! Even the general of the Shogun's Army doesn't dare to challenge him! ｜ 我们老大可是很厉害的啊！连幕府的大将都不敢应他的挑战！
- You've tried it once before, have you not? It can't hurt to have another go! ｜ 之前你不是也试过吗，反正试一试又没坏处啦！
- Seventeen Fleets ｜ 「十七支船队」
- How is it going? Any interesting results so far? ｜ 怎么样，有发生什么奇妙的事情吗？
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- After waiting for a while, you head to the location of the final component together with Klee, Kaeya, and Kokomi, whom Idyia called over. ｜ 稍作等待之后，和伊迪娅叫来的可莉、凯亚与珊瑚宫心海，一起出发前往最后的零件所在的地区…
- This is giving Paimon a headache... Paimon doesn't want to read any of this. Let's just skip it! The prize money is what's most important anyway... ｜ 好难懂啦，不想读，我们都跳过吧，最重要的是奖金…
- Curry, curry, in the air~♪ ｜ 咖喱的香味~♪
- Encompassing Brew ｜ 综括合剂
- Then it won't be long before she reels in Xbalanque himself. Now that'll be a wonder of wonders... ｜ 那看来她下一步就会钓到希巴拉克，嗯，奇观。
- When switching characters, all party members' ATK is increased by <color=#f39000>{0}%</color> for <color=#f39000>{1}</color>s. Max <color=#f39000>{2}</color> stacks. ｜ 切换角色时，队伍中所有角色的攻击力提升<color=#f39000>{0}%</color>，持续<color=#f39000>{1}</color>秒，此效果最多叠加<color=#f39000>{2}</color>层。
- The Sands of Al-Azif ｜ 啁哳之沙
- Everyone vigilantly watches as Albedo conducts a thorough investigation of the space... ｜ 在众人敬畏的注视下，阿贝多埋头检查起了现场…
- I must look ridiculous... ｜ 让大家见笑了。
- Let's call a ceasefire... ｜ 总之先休战…
- Thank you for your hard work, Ayaka. ｜ 绫华也辛苦了。
- Lunar Realm - Event Ending ｜ 「月中王国」活动结束提醒
- Snake Handler ｜ 弄蛇人
- So... I just need to take photos? ｜ 所以，我要做的只是留影？
- Loyal Servant ｜ 忠诚的侍从
- It's a story from very long ago... ｜ 那是很久以前的故事了…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Message ｜ 留言
- A complete nautical chart pieced together after all four parts of the clue were collected, leading to the treasure hidden by Ako Domeki and company before they left this place. ｜ 由离开此处的「赤穗百目鬼一众」留下的秘宝，四份线索收集完全之后，即可得到的，秘宝埋藏之处的海图。
- But the winds were too strong. Couldn't hear too well. ｜ 不过海风太大了，听得不是很清楚。
- That is indeed so. The fact that the relic has lit up means that it has found a "Guardian" worthy of acknowledgment. ｜ 嗯。圣物亮起，就意味着它已经找到了值得被认可的「守护者」。
- Elphane ｜ 欧菲妮
- They are... ｜ 那就是…
- Well then, one presumes upon your aid. ｜ 总之，就有劳你了。
- The God of Contracts. Have you heard of him? He has an impressive memory. He remembers the name of every person he comes across, and the date that every ship built in Liyue sets sail. After all, only in being able to do so can he memorize all of the contracts he holds. With that said, not every memory is a happy one... ｜ 「契约之神」的事情，听说过吗？\n他的记性很好。每位对手的名字，璃港船局建成以来制造的每一艘船起航的日子，都不曾忘却。毕竟，有这样的记忆力，才能铭记一切「契约」。\n然而，记性很好有时是令人不快的事。
- Unlocks when Player Level reaches 7 ｜ 牌手等级达到7级时解锁
- You once again encounter the illustrator Asagiri in Fontaine... ｜ 在枫丹，你又遇见了那位名为朝雾的画家…
- Sorry, I don't. ｜ 抱歉，我不会玩牌。
- Ah, it's you. It's been a while. ｜ 是你啊，好久不见。
- Oh? That doesn't sound too good... ｜ 哦？听起来不像什么好兆头啊…
- Okay, goodbye. ｜ 嗯，再见。
- Get Lv.15 Jean ｜ (test)获得15级角色琴
- Old Etchings ｜ 老旧的刻痕
- There aren't any riddles or pursuers here, so why don't we get some rest and prepare ourselves here? ｜ 这里似乎没有什么谜题，也没有什么追兵了。不如在这里休整一下吧。
- Ruin Guard ｜ 遗迹守卫
- The Akademiya and the Order of Skeptics went separate ways due to a clash in our ideals, but our research has always emphasized history and heritage. ｜ 虽说因为理念不合而与教令院分道扬镳，但矫论团毕竟是注重传承与历史的学者的一支。
- I'll help you convince the client to come to your side. ｜ 一起去说服刚刚的委托人吧。
- #Thank you so much, Nara {NICKNAME} and Paimon! ｜ #真是感谢你啊，那菈{NICKNAME}和派蒙！
- This is a matter for the Knights. ｜ 这是西风骑士团的事。
- Receiving a Gift: I ｜ 收到赠礼·其一
- Is that how Nara call it? Perhaps. Very likely. ｜ 那菈是这样称呼它的吗…？或许是吧。应该是。
- "A race reliant on the protection of the strong, a fragile world that cannot survive without the mighty... Do any such things need to exist?" ｜ 「仰赖强者庇佑的种族，一味遵循强者庇护的脆弱世界…真的有存在的必要吗？」
- After weighing the pros and cons, you decide to seek out the Wisdom Seelie's true identity. ｜ 权衡利弊之后，你们打算直接把「知慧仙灵」的正体找出来。
- Plunge DMG|{param8:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param8:F1P}
- It's always fun to have you around, Kaveh. ｜ …跟卡维聊天会很开心。
- Neuvillette can use this key to perform Normal Attacks ｜ 那维莱特能用该键位进行普通攻击
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Has anyone left a big impression on you during our recent travels?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> For Paimon, that's Sara.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Timmie.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> ...Huh? Why him?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> *sigh* His face comes to mind every time I've eaten a Sweet Madame recently... Really makes it hard to chow down. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>在最近的旅行里，你有没有什么留下深刻印象的人呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我的话，应该是莎拉吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>提米。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸！为什么？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>最近每次吃甜甜花酿鸡，都会想到他的脸…肉也变得难吃了。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Yup! For me, it's rock 'n' roll. ｜ 我有哦。我喜欢摇滚乐。
- Yep, that's the plan. Oh, actually, since we talked about the reconstruction earlier, wanna come with me and check out the town for yourself? ｜ 是啊。哦，对了，既然聊到重建的话题，你们要不要跟我一起去看看？
- I mean to say that your songs are outstanding! Believe you me, the baby Saurians crowd around and run about every time I play your music. Never seen them happier! ｜ 您的歌曲非常优秀啊！相信我，每次我放您的唱片时，龙宝宝们都围着我们疯跑，开心的要命！
- I thought since we're both successful businessmen, we could earn more Mora together. ｜ 本想着大家都是成功的生意人，一起互通有无，一定能赚到更多摩拉。
- Capture the Abyssal Aphids ｜ 捕捉深渊蜜虫
- A simulated monster based on the Hilichurl Fighter. Its weak spot is its <color=#FFCC33>head</color>.\nPerform a <color=#FFCC33>Piercing Strike</color> on its head to deal greater DMG... ｜ 以「打手丘丘人」为原型的模拟魔物，弱点位于<color=#FFCC33>头部</color>。\n在空中对头部发动<color=#FFCC33>刺挑攻击</color>，可以造成较高的伤害…
- Miyuki ｜ 阿幸
- Meow? ｜ 喵？
- Thundersoother's Plume ｜ 平雷之羽
- You mean <color=#00E1FFFF>Wanmin Restaurant</color>? Good choice! Let's go. ｜ 哦，你说的是<color=#00E1FFFF>「万民堂」</color>？不错的选择，那我们一起过去吧。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Since you're traveling alone, please watch out for your own safety... ｜ 独自在外游历，要多多注意安全啊…
- We'll be fine... ｜ 别担心…
- Come on! How long do you expect a guy to keep waiting, huh!? ｜ 真是的，到底要让我等到什么时候！
- A band of rogues has appeared out in the wild, threatening the safety of the surrounding area. Head over there and deal with them. ｜ 一群不怀好意的家伙出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全。前去打倒他们。
- Purchased from the Sumeru Souvenir Shop ｜ 须弥纪念品商店购买
- When a Lil' Fungus hovers above this Mechanicus, continuous Hydro DMG will be dealt to nearby Mechanici. ｜ 「小小灵蕈」停留在这种机关上方时，将持续对附近的「棋阵机关」造成水元素伤害。
- Let's find a way to unlock it instead, shall we? ｜ 我们还是想想打开锁的方法吧。
- And, with a ten percent increase in portion size, it's a new personal best! ｜ 这次的分量在上届的基础上又增加了十分之一，所以瓦雷莎再次刷新了最好成绩！
- I've already stopped living in the rainforest, but I still do rest at my campsites if I collect herbs there. ｜ 虽然现在我已经不在雨林里讨生活了…但进林子采草药的时候，我还是会在营地里休息一下。
- About Lisa... ｜ 关于丽莎…
- Time for you to shine, Paimon! Give us some light! ｜ 发点光，派蒙！
- Die Heilige Sinfonie ｜ 祝圣交响乐
- Any peace... ｜ 短暂的和平…
- Pyrrho ｜ 毕洛
- Seirai Island ｜ 清籁岛
- Swirl increased ｜ 扩散反应强度提高
- Oh, you want to play cards? Fine by me. We're not in the Cathedral, and I'm off the clock, anyway. ｜ 啊？要和我打牌？行啊，反正不在教堂里，也不是工作时间。
- Refreshing. My spontaneous outing seemed to inspire quite a few other spontaneous decisions as well. ｜ 很新鲜。从一次突发性的行动中，感受到了更多突然出现的想法。
- Will the next development be fortunate... or unfortunate? ｜ 接下来的发展…会是幸运还是不幸呢？
- Truly... I'm sorry for the trouble, everyone... ｜ 真是…麻烦大家了…
- Receiver of Friends From Afar: Part I ｜ 有朋自远方来·其一
- I see. However, I am but a foolish beast. Even if I wanted to see her again, I would not know of a better way. ｜ 原来如此。不过，我只是愚钝的野兽，就算想要再见到她，也不知道什么更好的办法。
- "...Remember my name, brother. As long as you remember me, I will never have left." ｜ 「…记住我的名字，兄弟。只要你记住我，那我就从未离去。」
- The dark metallic vessel owned by the Bloodstained Knight. Its exterior has been stained as black as the night by smoke and coagulated blood. ｜ 染血骑士持有的黯淡金属杯皿。外壁因为烟熏与凝结的血变得漆黑如夜。
- Tribal Announcement ｜ 部族公告
- Mm. The Teacher says that we must "smash the plates." ｜ 嗯，老师说，必须「摔碎盘子」。
- Paimon, please. "Who wrote this book, and why? Don't we think there might be a bigger safety risk here?" ｜ 派蒙，你刚刚还在说，「写这本书的人到底是谁？」「将来会不会威胁到大家的生命安全？」
- It's really simple! First, you've gotta sweet-talk them, show 'em you mean well so they relax their defenses. Then, you gently pat them on the head — that makes them feel more comfortable around you. ｜ 很简单！首先，你要先夸奖它，这样它就会感受到你的好意并放下防备。接着，再轻轻地摸摸它的头，你们就熟悉起来啦！
- Examine the traces of human activity here ｜ 调查在此驻足的人的痕迹
- Hmm... Okay, here's what we're gonna do. Unload the boat and put everything here, in one place. ｜ 唔，这样吧。把你船上的那些东西也卸下来，都放在这里。
- A promise is a promise. ｜ 约定就是约定。
- Uncrowned Lord of the Ocean ｜ 无冕的龙王
- Character Card ｜ 角色牌
- I wonder how Ladep and Pharez are doing with their work... ｜ 也不知道拉德普和法尔希工作得怎么样了…
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Potted Plant: Verdant Vastness.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「绿植盆栽-『苍翠寸泓中』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Eula's outfit. Consummate elegance shines through in this neat and smart knight's uniform. ｜ 优菈的装扮款式。利落中凸显典雅风范的骑士装束。
- As for forming contracts with Pari... We're already friends with Sorush, so Paimon thinks there's no need for formalities like that! ｜ 和花灵建立契约什么的…我们已经跟斯露莎混熟啦，应该不需要这种形式上的东西吧？
- Today, only the five most important survive. Only the smallest part of our Master's plan has been implemented, but even that is a form of success. ｜ 如今只有最重要的五处仍存。大师的计划仅有最低限度的实施，但这也是一种成功。
- How long are these attacks going to last... ｜ 眼前这不安定的状态，要持续到什么时候啊…
- According to custom, I should drop the formalities and just accept it, right? ｜ 按规矩，我也不该客套对吧？
- Blade Roller 2-Hit DMG|{param11:F1P} DEF ｜ 刃轮巡猎二段伤害|{param11:F1P}防御力
- Increases DMG against slimes by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>. ｜ 对史莱姆类敌人造成的伤害增加<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。
- Snowman Torso: Egg Fortress Classic ｜ 雪人躯干-「经典蛋堡」
- Sylvie requires 5 Beryl Conches. ｜ 希尔维娅需要5只苍晶螺。
- No wonder I had a nagging feeling that I should come over and have a look... Well met, "Tum{RUBY#[D]Hope}aini." ｜ 难怪总有种预感让我过来看看…原来是能遇上你，了不起的「杜{RUBY#[D]希望}麦尼」。
- Transfigured Dreams ｜ 异梦转化
- My chest was filled with all kinds of intense emotions. They just shook me even more than all the feelings we've shared during our previous adventures. ｜ 我的胸膛被各种各样的激烈情感填满，比之前的冒险都要强烈。
- So you mean that the Este here is Town-Este's ancestor, the real "Este the Quick-Witted"? What about the others? ｜ 照这么说，这里的埃斯特其实是镇上那个埃斯特的祖先，真正的「机智的埃斯特」？那其他人呢？
- Hmm, Paimon doesn't see anything here... Let's go somewhere else. ｜ 这里没看到，我们去其他地方看看。
- Due to security concerns, a ban on access to desert areas excluding the Sea of the Great Red Sand has been issued by the Akademiya. ｜ 由于安全问题，教令院已对大赤沙海外的其他沙漠地区发布了禁令，严禁前往。
- Leave the ruins ｜ 离开遗迹
- Haha, I see. Director Hu's hoping that you go out of business, Baizhu. ｜ 哈哈，我听明白了，胡堂主在祝白术没生意呢。
- Typically, at this point, we would crown our champion with the diadem as well as presenting them with their award. ｜ 原本在这里，我们会为卡维选手戴上冠冕、送上奖金。
- Though the Clan had fallen far indeed, none of its members had ever ceased fighting for justice... ｜ 门派虽已经是破落不堪，可行侠仗义之事从来未曾断辍…
- Sorry for bothering you. ｜ 打扰了。
- ...Wait, as one of the Seven, I'm not clear of suspicion yet either, am I? ｜ 呀，话说回来，身为七神之一，我自己的嫌疑都还没洗清…！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Vibrant Pot: Born in Flames.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「炫彩陶罐-『生于烈焰』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- I've been reading light novels for long time now. I'm mainly into big, ambitious fantasy works with an original core concept and good storytelling. ｜ 我很早以前就喜欢轻小说了，主要是喜欢那些天马行空的幻想，新奇的设定与好玩的故事。
- The answer is simple — I can retrieve similar riddles with a 70% match rate. ｜ 答案很简单，这个能检索到类似的谜语，匹配率百分之七十。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- When we were at the ruins, I tried to decipher the hidden information recorded in the slates. But since we only had three slates at the time, I was unable to come to a full conclusion. ｜ 那时在遗迹当中，我试着读取了石板中蕴藏的信息，可由于第一块石板的缺失，信息无法被完全解读。
- The Beam of Blocking will obstruct thrown Darts. Hit it a certain number of times to destroy it. ｜ 「碍板」会阻挡投出的「掷箭」，击中「碍板」一定次数后，方可将其破坏。
- Please be on your guard for the next few days. ｜ 你们两个，最近注意安全。
- Open the map to view the participants' locations ｜ 打开地图可以查看参赛者的位置
- As for you, Traveler, you're our esteemed guest. Please take the opportunity to stay in Liyue Harbor and enjoy the festivities. ｜ 旅行者，你是贵客，适逢佳节，还请留在城内好好享受节日氛围。
- Hand him 500,000 Mora. ｜ 交出五十万摩拉。
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Click}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} Ready and wait for other players. Co-Op challenge is automatically abandoned if not confirmed in {0} second(s). ｜ 点击准备等待其他玩家，{0}秒内不确认自动解散挑战
- The next day, you and Layla return to the same bookshelf. ｜ 过了一天，和莱依拉再次来到书架之前。
- Chat: Intuition ｜ 闲聊·直觉
- If you think about it that way, my life's way better than Goldman's. ｜ 在这一点上，我可比戈尔德曼好上太多了。
- I wonder how the folks in Fontaine managed to put this clever little thing together? It's so fascinating... ｜ 枫丹那边居然能鼓捣出这种东西来，真有意思…
- We don't want them thinking we're storming into their camp to attack them. ｜ 不然他们肯定会误会，以为我们是准备来攻击他们。
- There's another one here! Hmm... "If only I were a clever Aranara." ｜ 这里也有！嗯…「如果我是一只聪明的兰那罗就好了」。
- Eh... This drastic attitude change and that promise... ｜ 噫！突然就变脸了，还敢做出这种承诺…

- Every year, on the day of the first full moon, the Lantern Rite of Liyue takes place. On that night, everyone in Liyue releases Xiao Lanterns and Mingxiao Lanterns into the bright night sky. Within each of the xiao lanterns, placed a natural levitation stone, and on it hung one's wishful prayer, or a painting depicting one's desire. The lanterns slowly fly away while carrying a hope that the lights emitted by the lanterns might guide the soul of once Liyue's faithful protector, to return and reunite once more. You and Paimon have arrived at this solemn moment of Liyue, preparing for your five-days-long journey... ｜ 每年第一个月圆之夜，就是璃月的「海灯节」。在夜里，人们会放出「霄灯」和「明霄灯」，升上夜空。「霄灯」中编入了天然浮空的「浮生石」，挂上书写心愿或绘制图画的愿签放飞，祈愿历史上曾护佑璃月的英雄魂魄寻灯归来，一聚团圆。你与派蒙来到了节日期间的璃月，准备度过为期五日的旅程…$UNRELEASED

- When a character scores Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attack hits that deal Physical DMG to opponents, this character's CRIT Rate is increased by 3% for 10s. This effect stacks up to 5 times, and only 1 stack is added at a time regardless of how many enemies are hit in one strike. When 5 stacks have been obtained, CRIT Hits on opponents will unleash shockwaves that deal AoE DMG. A shockwave can be created in this manner once every 1s. ｜ 角色的物理属性的普通攻击、重击或下落攻击命中敌人时，该角色的暴击率提升3%，持续10秒，至多叠加5层；这些攻击类型同时命中多个敌人时，只能叠加一层。处于5层效果下的角色的攻击造成暴击时，会释放冲击波，造成范围伤害，每1秒至多释放一次冲击波。

- Sorush ｜ 斯露莎
- Objectively speaking, Itto's reputation leaves much to be desired within Inazuma City.\nEven though he is not considered a villain, he is certainly no law-abiding citizen either. If one really had to assign some sort of hazard level to him, then perhaps the level of being used by parents to keep naughty children in line ("If you don't behave, Arataki Itto will come and snatch your snacks away!" for example) might suffice.\nThat said, unlike threats of "the Great Mujina Youkai grabbing you and taking you deep into the mountains," or "being inlaid upon the Shogun's statue," the scenario threatened here can actually occur.\nStill, "snatching" is, again, not accurate, for the fate of these snacks is decided fair and square by ritual combat!\nIn the eyes of many, winning snacks off kids in competitions is exceedingly shameless, but Itto believes that every battle must be taken seriously, whether one's foe is a 5-year old child or the Almighty Shogun herself.\nIt is also due to this conviction that Itto can lose to a child without any reservations at all.\nAnd while the adults have much to say about his behavior, the children find Itto the big oni to be a rather good playmate.\nHe is knowledgeable about all manner of street games and plays them all with great gusto. He also stands up for any who are being bullied.\nLately, the children have been very into Onikabuto battles against Itto.\nThe rules of this game are simple and the fighting is both fierce and very watchable. Most importantly of all, they actually have a pretty decent chance of winning this one, unlike with other games. ｜ 客观地说，一斗在稻妻城一向风评欠佳。\n虽说不会被划在坏人行列，但也绝算不上是本分的好居民。\n如果真要探讨其危害性的话，大概就是偶尔会被年轻夫妇以「再不听话，就让荒泷一斗把你的零食全抢走！」威慑家中幼子的程度。\n比起「被大貉妖叼进深山」，或者「被将军大人砌进神像」，这句话的杀伤力在于，失去零食的惨剧真的有可能发生。\n不过，「抢夺」一说实属误会，决定零食归属的，乃是堂堂正正的较量！\n虽然在许多人看来，与孩子比赛并赢走零食也足够无耻，但一斗坚信，任何胜负都应该认真对待，无论对手是五岁的孩童，还是高高在上的雷电将军。\n正是基于这种朴素的信念，一斗即使败给小孩，也能够坦荡认输。\n大人们虽然对一斗颇有微词，但对于孩童们来说，这个鬼族大哥哥却是个不错的玩伴。\n他熟知各类街头游戏，无论玩什么都津津有味。如果遇到有人被欺负的情况，也总会出手打抱不平。\n最近，孩子们尤其热衷与一斗进行「鬼兜虫对战」。\n这种古老的斗虫游戏规则简单，战况激烈，有着很强的观赏性。更重要的是与其他游戏相比，胜率极有保障。

- Porcelain jars that are normally seen in Deshret Desert. The main part presents a deep "dark rock color," which is the product of the latest generation of desert pottery craft. The outer protective shell is said to be strong enough to withstand a blow from a hammer, and the jar protected by it would not shatter even if it fell from a high place. It is as strong as rock indeed, and therefore is ideal for storing things of value.\nSome sellswords, however, went in the opposite direction, trying to place a protective shell inside a clay flask filled with explosives, using its ruggedness to create a lot of shrapnel and build a more potent explosive barrel. But due to high costs, they ultimately decided against it. ｜ 可见于赤王沙漠中的陶瓶，主体部分呈现出深沉的「暗岩色」，是最新一代沙漠陶器工艺的产物，外层覆有保护的壳体，据说相当坚硬，足以承受铁锤的击打，从高处摔落也不会破碎，的确如岩石般牢固，可被用来储存贵重之物。\n一些佣兵反其道而行之，试图将保护壳体安放在填满炸药的陶瓶内部，利用其坚固的特性生成大量碎片，将其作为威力更强的炸药桶使用，但最终因成本过高而作罢。
- It looks pretty over-the-top, I know, but it's essentially just a box of cards... He kept the design simple so it'd be harder to break. ｜ 虽然看起来很夸张，但功能上只是一副普通的牌匣…因为结构太复杂的话，一不小心就会被弄坏。

- He doesn't seem all that fond of verifying anything, but oh, he's very fascinated with non-existent hypotheses and stories, that's for sure! He's giving me a real headache... ｜ 他似乎还很不愿意查证，只喜欢自说自话地假设些不存在的故事，真让人头疼！
- Safe travels. ｜ 祝您旅途平安。
- The legends claim that the siblings survived — and, having uncovered the tyrant's plot to stir up discord, fled together to a distant land. Yet from that day on, the Collective of Plenty's perspective on weapons was forever transformed. ｜ 尽管传说兄妹二人没有死去，而是识破了暴君挑拨离间的阴谋，一同逃去了远方，但此后沃陆对武器的看法也不同了。

- Keep your chin up! Everyone's trying to get through this. Great things are definitely waiting at the end of it all! ｜ 别灰心！这日子，大家都在硬撑着过。只要撑住了，总会有点好事发生的！

- That is a possibility. After all, she does remember things that have happened recently. ｜ 我不否认这种可能性。毕竟，妮赫佳还是能记得当下发生的事。

- Quick! We have to go make sure that the Exuvia is alright. ｜ 我们赶紧去确认一下「仙祖法蜕」有没有异常吧？
- Well, that's all relative. ｜ 多或少是个相对概念吧。
- The elders in my clan once said that we must always show the utmost respect to the Vigilant Yaksha. Apparently, the only time that our ancestor would gain some temporary relief from his insanity was when passing by the Wangshu Inn. It must have been the comforting effect of his presence that wards off evil spirits. That said, if I ever have the honor of fighting side by side with the Conqueror of Demons, I will focus only on the mission. I cannot let myself be distracted by concerns about his status. ｜ 家族的长辈们曾说，要对「护法夜叉」保持最大的敬畏。据说我那疯疯癫癫的先祖路过望舒客栈时，都会少见地安分下来，想必是被他那驱除邪祟的威压给照顾了。但若是有一天，我有幸与那位「降魔大圣」并肩作战，我还是会以任务为重，不可能因为他的身份而有所顾忌。
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- So yeah, I'm sure your companion would enjoy my food too! ｜ 你的伙伴肯定也会喜欢的！
- Test the Ancient Name outside the camp ｜ 到营地外检查古名
- Unleashing his magic, Lyney turns himself into a Grin-Malkin Cat that can move around quickly. (Not to be mistaken for the Grin-Malkin Hat. They're two different props!)\nWhen the Grin-Malkin Cat gets close to opponents, it will send flames falling down on them, dealing at most 1 instance of <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color> to each opponent. When the duration ends, he will dismiss the Grin-Malkin Cat and ignite fireworks that deal <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color>, summon 1 Grin-Malkin Hat, and grant himself 1 Prop Surplus stack.\n\nGrin-Malkin Cat can be actively canceled.\n\n<i>"Watch closely now. This is a time for miracles, and it belongs to just the two of us!"</i> ｜ 林尼施展魔术，化形为能够快速移动的「怪笑帽帽猫」。（并不是「怪笑猫猫帽」。这是两个不同的演出道具！）\n怪笑帽帽猫接近敌人时，会对身边的敌人降下焰火，对每个敌人造成至多一次<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害</color>。持续时间结束时林尼将解除怪笑帽帽猫，引爆华丽的礼花，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>，召唤一顶怪笑猫猫帽，并获得一层「隐具余数」。\n\n可以主动解除怪笑帽帽猫。\n\n<i>「那就让你们稍微见识一下吧，要看仔细咯，这是仅属于我们的，独一无二的，奇迹时刻！」</i>
- I will be able to unleash power beyond my limits if I can reverse the process of growth. ｜ 只要逆转「成长」这个过程，我就能释放出超越我极限的力量。
- A fantastic bookshelf of unknown origins. It is elegantly shaped with a sturdy build, and possesses ample storage space that far belies its appearance. It holds a large amount of seemingly handpicked books that contain fascinating content from unnamed authors. Thanks to the bookshelf's ingenious design, any user can quickly add, remove, and search for books with ease. ｜ 来历未知的奇特书柜，造型精致，结构稳固，有着远超外表的储存空间，摆放着大量作者不明但内容精彩的书籍，似是精选而出的作品。得益于书柜巧妙的结构，还能快速查找书籍，便捷地拿取与存放。

- An orderly and traditional commercial building with the same appearance and construction as Puspa Café in Sumeru City. According to some sources, Puspa Café spent a large sum of money to hire scholars to analyze the building's structure. After prudently considering the connection between airflow and customer experience, they decided to only put one dining floor to use. Nowadays, a mouthwatering aroma is always wafting out of the café. Is it possibly connected to this architectural decision...? ｜ 规整而传统的商业建筑，与须弥城中的普斯帕咖啡馆有着相同的外形与构造。据说，普斯帕咖啡馆重金聘请学者进行分析建筑构造，谨慎考虑空气流通与客户体验的关联后，作出了仅仅设置一层营业空间的决定。咖啡馆总有馥郁的香气飘扬而出，不知是否与这一决策有关…

- The adepti of Liyue were born amongst the elemental energy that courses between heaven and earth. As pure elemental beings, they are closer to the origin of ultimate truth than ordinary mortals.\nFor Xianyun, channeling elemental power is something that can be done almost subconsciously. She requires the aid of no external focus to do so, let alone a Vision.\nBut now that she's walking the mortal realm in human form, following human rules somehow seems oddly appropriate. To her, using a Vision as a medium to harness elemental power couldn't be easier... so why not?\nXianyun certainly does not value the Vision that she wears on her arm in the same way that a mortal would. But carrying it with her led to a discovery.\nOne time, as she was passing through Dihua Marsh, she came upon a farmer. Despite the fact that he was tall and carried a hoe, he was trembling and immobilized with fear in the face of a pair of short, feeble-looking bandits who were threatening him with daggers. Intending to help, Xianyun stepped forward — but seeing that she was a woman and slightly-built to boot, he tried to persuade her to stay out of it so she wouldn't get hurt.\nBut when Xianyun turned to speak to him, he saw her Vision and immediately took her for a chivalrous hero instead. His tone and posture changed in the blink of an eye, and after bidding her join him in driving off the bandits, he charged straight at them. In the end, the hoe-brandishing farmer singlehandedly repelled the two thieves, with Xianyun merely knocking a dagger out of one of their hands. Yet looking at the shining Vision on her arm, the farmer kept exclaiming how much he wished he had one.\nOf course, the farmer didn't need a Vision — all he really needed was a little courage. But she saw the effect that the Vision had on him, and how his expression changed so completely it was almost as if he had become another person. The profound influence that an external object could exert upon a person became apparent in that instant.\nFor a time, this left her feeling puzzled.\nThough it may be true that everything in this world possesses its own objective characteristics, but changing how you act towards a person because of an external object... surely that was folly in almost all cases. Known for her candor, she has always been easily moved to commend or scorn, but her judgment was always based on essence rather than appearance.\nWhen people are friendly to her, she treats them kindly back; but when they're vile, all she has for them is her contempt. This is how she is when she's Cloud Retainer, so it's how she'll be as the chivalrous hero Xianyun too.\n"Open your eyes and take a look around — I didn't lift a finger. Since you can rely on your own skill to drive away your enemies, you should show some more confidence." Xianyun had said her piece, so with a flick of her sleeve, she was off.\nWith heroism she cleanses the world below, and with wisdom imparts the laws of nature. To this day Xianyun walks the mortal realm still, poised and unaffected. ｜ 璃月仙众诞于天地之间飘荡的元素力，本是至纯的元素生物，因此与常人相比更接近道心本源。\n对闲云来说，引导元素力几乎是下意识就能完成的事，无需借助任何器官，更无需依赖神之眼。\n不过如今的她以人形现身尘世，这副身躯最适应的还是人的规则，佩戴神之眼，以此为媒介驱使元素力也是易如反掌，那便遵循红尘中的规则吧。\n故而，闲云对臂上这枚神之眼并不像普通人一般重视。但带着这神之眼行走仍使她发现一类事。\n曾经，她于荻花洲路遇一农夫。农夫身材高大，手持锄头，却被两个身形孱弱的矮小匪徒持匕首威胁，瑟瑟发抖不敢反抗。她本着助人的心思走上前去，但农夫见她是女子形貌，又生得苗条，反劝她不要生事以免伤了自身。\n然而当闲云侧身同农夫说话，农夫便发觉闲云是佩有神之眼的所谓「侠士」，语气和姿态当即一变，立刻请闲云同他一道驱赶贼人，说着便挥舞起锄头冲向匪徒。最终农夫仅靠一把锄头就赶走了这两个贼人，闲云不过出手打掉了其中一个匪徒的匕首而已，农夫却看着她臂上闪烁的神之眼，反复感叹自己要是有神之眼就好了。\n农夫当然不需要神之眼，他需要的只是一点勇气，但有眼与无眼在此人心中差异如此之大，以至于他前后神色大异，判若两人。世人常受外物所累，可见一斑。\n此事曾令她一度不解。\n虽说这世间之物皆有其客观特性，但因外物而生的趋炎附势或冷眼相待却多为愚钝。她生来是爱憎分明的性格，但评价向来是触及事物根本，而非浮于表面。\n遇可亲之人便厚待，遇可恶之人便藐视。作为留云借风真君时作风如此，作为侠士闲云亦然。\n「你自己睁大眼睛看看，我可没帮你什么，既然能靠自己的本事退敌，就拿出自信来。」说罢闲云拂袖而去。\n以侠心洗濯尘世，以慧心传授天道，今日，闲云依旧潇洒行走红尘。

- And it's been years since! Alphonso is practically one of us now! ｜ 一晃过去好几年了呢！现在，艾方索已经完全是我们维摩庄的壮丁了，嘿嘿。

- That's right! I escaped by the skin of my teeth. The fact that I'm even alive to tell the tale must be a sign that the gods were watching over me. ｜ 对啊，真是九死一生的旅程，我能活下来，应该都是神明的眷顾吧。

- Perhaps it was a prop for a different trick? But why would it have been left here? ｜ 可能是其他魔术里的道具吧…但怎么会掉在这里呢？
- You're only back now? Well then. Did you get the intel? ｜ 怎么才回来？情报拿到了吗？

- That's right. In fact, back when we were first creating Simulanka, M told us that she hoped the people of this world would one day be able to explore the wider world beyond. ｜ 没错。其实在创造希穆兰卡的时候，M就对我们说，希望这里的居民有朝一日能去外面探索更广阔的世界。
- *sigh* She still won't talk to me. I—I've run out of ideas... ｜ 师妹她…唉，依然不肯理我。我，我也不知怎么劝她…
- Life in the Knights of Favonius was not easy for Amber in the beginning.\nBeing as young as she was and having just lived through the trauma of losing her grandpa, the senior knights made a point of taking special care of her.\nHowever, for a girl as desperate to excel as she was, being taken care of by others implied that she wasn't yet mature enough to stand on her own two feet.\nAccordingly, she voraciously sought out extra responsibilities and made this as visible as possible to her seniors.\nFinally, during an intense engagement with some monsters, the seniors noticed her bravery and resourcefulness in the heat of battle.\nThat was the moment when they realized that their little girl was growing up.\nAs she matured, she also became more at ease with herself. Whatever feedback she met with, be it praise, rebuke, silence, or taunting, her response was always the same.\n"For sure, I may still have a way to go before I catch up with my seniors. But one day, I'm gonna be the best Outrider ever!"\nAmber is not prone to too much deliberation, preferring instead to speak her mind, truthfully and frankly, at every occasion.\nShe firmly believes that she will not disappoint her grandpa. ｜ 一开始，安柏在骑士团的生活并不顺利。\n年纪太小，又刚经历了祖父失踪的坎坷，安柏时常被老一辈骑士们过分关照。\n而在这位要强的少女眼中，「过分关照」意味着她还不成熟，不足以独当一面。\n少女因而为自己强加上重任，沐浴着前人的视线，顽强又认真地履行职责。\n终于，在一次剿灭魔物的激烈战斗中，前辈们见证了安柏的英勇机敏。\n那一刻，他们首次意识到，面前这个尚且年轻的女孩，已经成长到了一定地步。\n随着成长，安柏的心也越来越安定。不论面对夸赞或贬低，沉默或嘲讽，她都如此回应——\n「跟前辈们相比，我还是经验不足。但是，我会成为最优秀的侦察骑士！」\n没有丝毫犹豫，仅仅是将自己的想法真诚、直率地说出。\n因为她一直坚信，自己绝不会辜负祖父的嘱托。

- Does anything NOT make you think about food? ｜ 这也能联想到吃的？

- It's just a shame... *cough* Everything behind it has been buried under rocks. For all we know, this was once an important route into the satellite city. ｜ 只可惜…咳咳，这后面都被山体掩埋了，说不定以前这里也是「卫城」的某个重要通道。
- But all that is about to change. Soon, you will be able to venture into the world beyond. ｜ 不过，你很快就能向更外面的世界迈进了。

- I don't know who the professional is. I assume it would be either someone from the Grand Narukami Shrine or from the Yashiro Commission, but I did not ask. Given the time, I believe they should have completed the purchase by now. ｜ 虽然不知道是哪位「专业人士」，但估计是鸣神大社或社奉行所属，我也不便多问。算算时间，应该已经拿到了吧。

- Forget it. I've been shut indoors ever since joining the Sumeru Akademiya. I haven't done any outdoor activities since. ｜ 算了吧，我去了教令院之后，就一年到头呆在屋内，基本上不去室外活动。
- The key to debugging the motherboard is in being familiar with the circuit structure. Connect the source of the signal to the receiving end to ensure the signal is transmitted smoothly! ｜ 调试主板的基本要领在于熟悉回路的结构，按照规则连接信号起点与信号终点，让信号流畅地传递吧！

- I gotta interview him today... I have to... ｜ 今天一定要采访到他…一定要…
- Wouldn't be nice if I stole all the fun from you, y'know? ｜ 这么好玩的东西，我觉得我不应该抢先了。

- Xiao lunges forward, dealing <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo DMG</color> to opponents in his path.\nCan be used in mid-air.\nStarts with 2 charges.\n\n<i>According to the legends of another land, the world will someday be crushed by two great wind wheels. Xiao's mastery over polearms is transcendent, ripping his foes apart like those legendary wind wheels.</i> ｜ 疾速突进，对路径上的敌人造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素伤害</color>。\n可以在空中施放。\n初始拥有2次可使用次数。\n\n<i>在他乡的传说里，世界会被两大风轮碾碎。魈的枪术已臻化境，来回之间仿佛两座风轮同时撕裂敌人。</i>
- I'm not the friend to come to for words of comfort or encouragement. But, when it comes to weighing the costs of your actions, ask away. ｜ 激励与抚慰是别人的强项，度量「代价」则是我的做法。

- Simply put, this is about Tadhla's coming-of-age ceremony. Please witness her growth for me. ｜ 长话短说，是塔德菈的「成年礼」。我请求你们替我见证她的成长。
- Alright, sounds like a plan. ｜ 我也这么觉得。

- Hmph, I know who you are. ｜ 哼，你的名字我早就知道了。
- Triple-Layered Consommé also uses Fowl, and its other ingredients are Ham and Bamboo Shoots. These are also flavors from the mountains, but they complement and contrast with the chicken dish — fresh instead of spicy, cold instead of hot. ｜ 扣三丝的食材也用到了禽肉，另外还有火腿和竹笋。同为山中韵味，辣与鲜，热与凉，两两相配，能与椒椒鸡遥相呼应。
- Ahh... ｜ 呃…
- How do you like it here? ｜ 在这里还习惯吗？

- Let me put it this way: have you seen an iceberg? You can only see what floats above the surface. No one can know what lies beneath. ｜ 呵，您见过浮冰吗？人的眼睛能看到的只是水面上的那部分，而水面之下隐藏着的部分…谁都不知道有多大。
- ...Then why was I sick? ｜ 可是，那我为什么会生病呢？
- He somehow went and got a certificate saying I was unfit for service. Of course, the name on it says "Saimon Katsumi"! ｜ 他还不知从哪托人给我弄了张智力残障证明书…当然，上面的名字是「敝侄 柴门克己」，哈哈！
- Exit the cave ｜ 离开洞穴
- Another successful training! ｜ 今天的修炼…
- Like I said, getting angry at angsty teenagers is draining. Besides... ｜ 我说过，跟这个年纪的孩子生气很消耗能量。而且…
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- He's been fiddling with some old books that haven't been selling well all day, and I haven't been able to dissuade him from doing so. ｜ 那家伙现在成天在家里捣鼓一些卖不出去的旧书，真是拿他没办法。
- An opposing piece based on a Dendro Samachurl.\nKindlejoy went missing one day by accident, and by the time Haniyyah and Souka found it, it was happily chasing a Dendro Samuchurl around, dancing around the burning vines...\nThe Lil' Dendro Samachurl can summon vines to block its opponents' movements and also deal DMG. ｜ 以「草丘丘萨满」为原型设计的对手棋子。\n某天「欢腾之火」不慎走失，海妮耶和左右加找到它时，发现它正开心地追逐一位草丘丘萨满，并且围着点燃的藤蔓跳舞…\n「小小草丘丘萨满」能够召唤出藤蔓，阻拦对手行动的同时造成伤害。
- Alright, I'm more than ready. After all, I made sure to build a deck that combines only the best of the best! ｜ 没问题，我早就准备好了。我的牌组可是「集诸家之所长」喔。
- Slime condensate that you just obtained. Who knows what Diona might do with it... ｜ 刚刚取得的史莱姆凝液。不知道迪奥娜会用来做什么…
- Alright then. This time with your eyes open. ｜ 好吧，那我们再仔细找找。
- The Dendro Archon is known as the God of Wisdom because her consciousness is directly connected to it. It is also said that the Dendro Archon's power is a manifestation of Irminsul. ｜ 草神之所以也被称为「智慧之神」，正是因为她的意识连接着世界树。草神的力量，其实也可以说是世界树力量的一种体现。
- Look for Albedo ｜ 寻找阿贝多
- Saimon Katsumi leaves in a huff. ｜ 柴门克巳骂咧咧地离开了。
- There are two copies of this book — one's been marked up, the other hasn't. I'm guessing you're looking for the one with the marks? ｜ 这本书有两册，一册有记号，一册没有，我猜你们想借阅的是有记号的那本，对吧。
- Say what? ｜ 哪个？
- Lucien... Why... ｜ 卢西恩…为什么…
- Relax. Both of us are here. If things go bad, we can fight our way out... or flee to safety. ｜ 放心啦，有你在，有我在。我们就可以要么杀出来，要么逃出来！
- Who's "he," if I might ask? ｜ 他是…？
- Free Onikabuto Lunch ｜ 天上掉下个鬼兜虫
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Spiral Abyss</color>\nA massive underground city constructed by an ancient civilization long gone. To this day, the purpose of this underground city remains unknown. Its structure is divided into the "Abyss Corridor," which connects worlds, and the "Abyssal Moon Spire," which leads to the unknown. It is now collectively called the "Spiral Abyss"... It is said that many secrets and treasures that have been long forgotten by this world lay buried within...\nMonsters and humans alike flock to the tower in search of the secrets and treasures it contains. Challenge different floors of the tower and defeat the opponents within to win Abyssal Stars. Do this, and the Spiral Abyss may yet look upon your hard work and bestow rewards upon you.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Abyssal Stars, Chambers, and Floors</color>\nThe Spiral Abyss is divided into floors with each floor containing 3 chambers. Each chamber has 3 challenges with increasing difficulty.\nAbyssal Stars will be rewarded upon completing the challenges. The 3 chambers of each floor must be cleared with a minimum of 6 Abyssal Stars in order to proceed to the next floor.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Abyss Corridor and the Abyssal Moon Spire</color>\nThe Spiral Abyss is composed of two parts: the "Abyss Corridor" and the "Abyssal Moon Spire."\nClear all 8 floors of the Abyss Corridor to unlock the Abyssal Moon Spire.\nThe Abyssal Moon Spire will reset itself every month, with a new Lunar Phase occurring on the sixteenth day.\nHowever, the generous treasures found in the Abyss Corridor which connects the world to the Abyssal Spire will not change or reset over time.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Restrictions and Ley Line Disorders</color>\nThere are several restrictions in the Spiral Abyss. When challenging 3 chambers consecutively, you cannot:\n·Consume food or other such items\n·Change party members\n·Change artifacts or weapons\n·Level up or ascend characters.\n\nIn addition, each floor in the Spiral Abyss has different Ley Line Disorders. It can give buffs or debuffs to characters, opponents, or both. In order to complete the challenge more easily, you should always take the Ley Line Disorders into consideration.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Blessings and Benedictions</color>\nChallengers will receive recognition from the depths of the Spiral Abyss. This recognition comes in the form of a buff that assists you in battle. \nThe blessing in the Spiral Abyss changes every month and provides a range of buffs. You can check the current buff in "Blessing of the Abyssal Moon."\n\nIn addition, at the start of each chamber, you can choose to receive one Benediction of the Abyss, which are refreshed every day. Different benedictions have different effects and durations:\n·Effective this floor: Effect lasts until entering the next floor.\n·Effective this chamber: Effect lasts until entering the next chamber.\n·Effective immediately: Effect starts immediately.\nChoosing the right benediction according to your party composition will help you complete the challenge more easily.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Divergence</color>\nIt is said that some floors in the Spiral Abyss will diverge into two paths. To dive deeper, you must split your party into two groups...\nCertain chambers will be divided into first and second halves. To clear the chamber, you need to split your party into two groups and clear each half separately. You cannot have the same characters in both groups.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Rewards and Reset</color>\nClearing the Spiral Abyss gives you generous rewards. Clearing each chamber for the first time allows you to receive the "Chamber Bounty." Earn enough Abyssal Stars in each chamber to collect the "Star's Bounty." You can check the rewards in the Reward Preview.\n\nWith the start of a new Lunar Phase on the sixteenth day of each month, the Abyssal Moon Spire's rewards will reset, which may also cause a new period of Blessing of the Abyssal Moon to begin.\nAbyss Corridor rewards will not be reset over time. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【深境螺旋】</color>\n由早已覆灭的远古文明，修建的巨大地下古都。究竟是出于何种目的而修建，如今已经不可知。其结构被分为连结世界的「深境回廊」与通往未知的「渊月螺旋」，故此统称为「深境螺旋」。据说，其中埋葬着早已被这个世界遗忘的秘密与宝藏…\n觊觎着其中宝藏与知识的人与魔物，占据了这座螺旋塔。战胜各层各关的挑战，剿灭其中的敌人，赢得「渊星」，就能获得隐藏在其中的，某种伟大意志的嘉许吧…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：渊星、间与层】</color>\n深境螺旋的空间由「层」划分。每一层，包含了3「间」。每一间中，则有3个难度递进的挑战。\n完成挑战时，能获得「渊星」。通过每一层的3间，并获得至少6颗渊星，才能获得进入下一层的资格。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：深境回廊与渊月螺旋】</color>\n深境螺旋由两部分组成：「深境回廊」与「渊月螺旋」。\n完成深境回廊所有8层后将开启「渊月螺旋」。\n渊月螺旋每个月的第十六日会自行重置一次。\n而连接世界与渊月螺旋，隐藏着丰厚宝藏的深境回廊，不会随时间重置与变化。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：限制与地脉异常】</color>\n深境螺旋的战斗中，存在各种限制。在每层的3间连续挑战中，将无法：\n·使用食物等道具；\n·调整队伍成员；\n·更换圣遗物与武器装备；\n·进行升级、突破等角色养成。\n\n此外，在深境螺旋的每一层中，存在着各自不同的「地脉异常」，地脉异常会对其中的角色与敌人造成各种正面或负面效果。希望能高效地攻克关卡的话，在队伍配置时与战斗中，也应积极将地脉异常的效果纳入考量。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：祝福与降福】</color>\n挑战者会得到来自深境螺旋深处的认可与期许。这份认可与期许，能化作让人奋战不止的力量。\n每个月，深境螺旋中会可能出现不同的祝福，提供各种各样的增益效果。当前周期的效果可以通过「渊月祝福」查阅。\n\n此外，每一间开始时，可以选择一种每天都会更新的「深秘降福」。不同的降福会拥有各异的效果，与持续时间：\n·此层生效：持续直到进入下一层；\n·本间生效：持续直到进入下一间；\n·立即生效：如字面所示，立刻发生。\n根据当前队伍的情况，选择适合的降福，能更有效地应对挑战。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：路径分叉】</color>\n据说深境螺旋的某些地方，存在着分岔的路径。要继续深入的话，就需要兵分两路，一同攻克…\n一些间会分为上半与下半两部分。要通过的话，需要将所拥有的角色编成两支队伍，分别完成上半与下半各自的挑战。两支队伍的角色不能重复。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：奖励与重置】</color>\n攻克深境螺旋能获得不菲的奖励。每一间首次挑战成功时，都可以领取「间之秘宝」；每一层中获得一定的渊星后，能领取「星之秘宝」。奖励可以通过「奖励预览」查看。\n\n每个月的第十六日，将会重置渊月螺旋的奖励，并可能产生新的渊月祝福。\n深境回廊的奖励不会随时间重置。

- A small cake, shaped into a long rectangle. It is said that long, long ago, a certain patissier used the great love the people of Fontaine held for their Hydro Archon as inspiration to create this confectionary masterpiece. The manifold layers stacked one upon the other are a true test of the chef's skills, and each aspect of this cake is proof of the great Hydro Archon's influence. ｜ 长条形的小蛋糕。据说这是很久很久以前，某位糕点师以枫丹民众对水神大人的热爱为灵感，创作而成。堆叠而起的多重层次、考验厨艺的制作工序，无一不证明着水神大人的影响力。

- A type of fish commonly found in bodies of water everywhere. Their meat is sumptuous, making them an important resource for fish-related gourmet dishes in Teyvat.\nBlue-Fin Basses have softer flesh than those of their black-backed cousins, which is very welcome amongst those who prefer delicate tastes. ｜ 各处的水域中都十分常见的鱼类。肉质肥美，是提瓦特各种美食中的鱼肉的主要来源。\n蓝鳍鲈鱼的肉质相比黑背鲈鱼而言更加绵软，更受追求细腻口感的食客欢迎。

- Report back to Smiley Yanxiao ｜ 向言笑回报
- A crown once worn by an ancient shaman who worshiped the Thunderbird. The capricious beast remained unmoved by the shaman's devotion. ｜ 古代崇拜雷之魔鸟的萨满曾戴过的头冠，虔诚的信仰却无法打动喜怒无常的魔兽。
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT], heals this character for 2 HP. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]，治疗本角色2点。
- After a character triggers a Swirl reaction, all party members' <color=#F39000FF>Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attack DMG is increased by 20%</color> for 10s. This effect can be triggered once every 0.1s. Max 3 stacks. Each stack's duration is counted independently. ｜ 角色触发扩散反应后，队伍中所有角色的<color=#F39000FF>普通攻击、重击与下落攻击造成的伤害提升20%</color>，该效果持续10秒，每0.1秒至多触发一次，至多叠加3层，每层独立计时。
- "When I return with a top ranking, I'll throw an awesome event for you guys — a huge watersports products giveaway!" ｜ 「等我拿到漂亮的名次，回来就给大家办厉害的活动，水上用品大赠送！」
- But it turns out that once in a while, you just can't beat a good bit of street food! ｜ 可偶尔吃吃大排档的大众料理，居然意外地还不错？
- A feather mask with falcon-esque plumage. Many legends surround this object. ｜ 如同鹰隼一般的羽面，围绕着它曾有过许许多多的传说。
- Oz's Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 奥兹存在时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Missive of Cloud and Fog ｜ 云与雾之信
- We're here to take care of a problem. ｜ 我们是来解决问题的。
- It was indeed the right decision to not wait for them. ｜ 果然，不等他们是正确的选择。
- A strange tree unique to the region around The Chasm. Its lineage brings it quite close to the Sandbearer Tree, and their respective wood qualities are indeed similar, such that most will not treat the two as separate species. However, this tree sports smoky-red leaves of exceeding loveliness as a result of the unique conditions of the land they grow on. It is said that this tree will display the characteristics of the Drooping Dew art of calligraphic penmanship if you look at it from just the right angle, which is how it derives its name. ｜ 仅生长于层岩巨渊一带奇异树木，生物谱系似乎与却砂树相近，木材的性质也基本相同，人们大多时候不会刻意区分两者的称呼。似是受到特殊水土的影响，有着「烟红色」的叶片，尤为绚美。据说从特定角度观望，树干呈现出「垂露」笔法的特征，因而获得了这一称呼。
- An exquisite-looking dish. The sweetness of the ham and the crisp lotus seeds are a match made in heaven. The aromatic broth pours down like the dawning light, caressing your tongue with an unworldly delicious taste. ｜ 造型精致的菜肴。咬开白嫩菜叶，鲜香火腿融合脆爽莲子丝丝入味。浓厚高汤犹如暮光倾泻，而舌尖则悠然快哉泛舟湖上。
- Biram ｜ 庇兰
- Reliable Narrator ｜ 可靠的叙事者
- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- Goncourt ｜ 龚古尔
- If everyone sees that the Shogun is in good health, it'll put all the speculation and rumors out there to rest! ｜ 大家只要见到将军还健康，外面的猜测和谣言就都会不攻自破的！
- It is composed of materials as light as bamboo and as strong as iron. This composition grants it the lightness of weight to ascend into the sky and the durability to follow the wind for many a mile. It is built with a series of intersecting rods that... ｜ 构结之材轻如竹坚如铁，掷于天际，亦可凭风遨游万里。再说其中构结之法、循六结十二道…
- ...It was the older of the merchant brothers, right? ｜ …好像是那对商人里的哥哥？
- Zhongli: Serious ｜ 钟离·认真
- Sounds like you're not considering Ponche's idea... ｜ 所以你不打算考虑下庞塞先生说的吗…
- ... ｜ ……
- Ah, perfect. This lady's granddaughter is going abroad soon, and she'd like to give her an omamori before she leaves. ｜ 啊，你们来得正好。这位婆婆，想为快出国的孙女求一枚御守。
- We have such a good relationship, so... surely you won't mind? ｜ 我们关系这么好，你肯定不会介意的吧？
- *cough* Well, to tell the truth, despite the tongue-lashing, my mentor did grant me a considerable amount of research funding. I would be willing to pay handsomely... ｜ 咳。实不相瞒，导师虽然把我骂得狗血淋头，但过后还是特批了一笔不菲的实验经费。我打算重金聘请两位…
- One's disciples... ｜ 徒弟们…
- Later, we both entered the Akademiya, and he became a Rtawahist Dastur. ｜ 后来，我们一起到了教令院。他还成为了明论派陀裟多。

- What!? ...Don't think I won't revisit this later. ｜ 哈？回头再来收拾你们…
- Wow, there are so many people here! Looks like it really is getting too dangerous for people to stay out in the wild. ｜ 真的有很多人聚集到这里，看来已经不能随便到野外去了。
- Achievement: Thunderclap ｜ 成就·雷音
- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- It would have been uninteresting had I told her what was going to happen ahead of time. ｜ 如果提前告诉她这里会发生什么，也就变得无趣了。
- Let's cut to the chase! ｜ 一步到位！
- I should be fine as long as I bring plenty of water. Besides, I just can't shake this ominous feeling that if we don't catch up to them soon... *sigh* ｜ 水源充足的情况下还行。而且我总有种预感…最好马上跟过去看看。
- Your current Active Character <color=#FFFFFFFF>gains 1 $[K310]</color>. ｜ 我方当前出战角色<color=#FFFFFFFF>获得1点$[K310]</color>。
- ...Paimon's gotta ask — what exactly did you make your cart from, Klee? ｜ …小可莉，我还是忍不住问一下，你的车是用什么作为「素材」的？
- Favorite Food ｜ 喜欢的食物…
- You want to go on an adventure? ｜ 你是想出去冒险吗？
- Back so soon? ｜ 你们这就回来了？
- Have you ever experienced Candace's hospitality? She cooks very generous portions — even I could barely finish. So long as you're on the receiving end of her hospitality and not her wrath, you'll live a long and happy life. ｜ 你被坎蒂丝招待过吗？她做饭超大份的，连我都差点没吃完。不过吃饭就好了，千万别吃她的拳头。
- Haha, I just wanted to see what you'd say... sorry about that. ｜ 哈哈，只是稍微想看看你们打算如何应对，抱歉抱歉。
- Anyway, thank you! ｜ 不管怎样，谢谢你们！
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Please be at ease. ｜ 请您放心吧。
- How could this happen... I'm not malicious... I never meant for any of this to happen... ｜ 怎么会发生这种事…我本来不想当坏人，不想给别人添麻烦的呀…
- You had me worried on the way here, you know. I seriously wondered if you were taking me to the Kamisato residence or the shrine... ｜ 你带我来的路上我还吓了一跳，以为你要把我送去神里家或者神社呢…
- Sure. ｜ 嗯。
- Yes. Trust. ｜ 嗯，相信。
- I see you are one of great strength, and so I humbly beseech you to please venture forth to the top of this cliff, where you should please find me three Qingxin flowers, with which to infuse in hot water and bring some small relief to Que'er's aching throat. ｜ 我看朋友功夫也是不凡的，能不能请你帮我去旁边的山崖顶上摘三朵清心回来，我给小雀儿泡水喝养养嗓子。
- Shiki Taishou ｜ 式大将
- Gotcha. Well, knowing that he's got a friend like you to rely on makes me feel much better about this whole thing. ｜ 我明白了。哈哈，他能有你这样的朋友，我也放心了。

- There is nothing on this island except for a shipwreck. What kind of intuition is that? ｜ 岛上根本什么都没有，只有一截断船嘛，这就是你感应到的宝藏？
- 5-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Haniyyah used to be an energetic and happy person. She wore her heart on her sleeve, and she never had the slightest intention of hiding her emotions. I often worry if someone with ill intent will take advantage of her. ｜ 以前的海妮耶是个开朗、活泼，心情都写在脸上的人。这也让人担心，她会不会被抱着坏心思的人读懂后利用。

- Well, it looks like someone saw him in Aaru Village. I wonder where he ended up? ｜ 然后呢，貌似有人曾在阿如村见过他哦。不知道他最后去了哪里呢？
- Well... Thanks, but I won't. We don't trust the city folk. ｜ 唔…谢谢，不了。我们不信任城里的人。
- I see... Splendid! This is a good sign! ｜ 嗯…嗯！好，这个好啊。
- Great. Then it's decided. ｜ 好，那就这样安排。
- You sure love to use weird analogies. ｜ 纳西妲还是很喜欢用这种奇奇怪怪的比喻呢。
- We heard that you had made a good friend recently, and even went for a dive with him. Your powers were such that you didn't even need to use any diving equipment, isn't that right, my dear Luca? ｜ 听说，最近您在这里认识了一位好朋友，与他一同入水。您本领高强，甚至不需要潜水护具。您说对吧？亲爱的卢卡。
- Is that so... Ah, then take my advice, brave warrior. Leave here quickly. ｜ 是嘛…啊呀，听我一句劝吧，勇士，还是快些离去吧。
- I've also made up my mind. C'mon, let's go see Auntie. ｜ 我也做好决定了。走吧，我们去找婶婶。

- ...Eager to leave, Conqueror of Demons? ｜ …降魔大圣？
- How could... How could something like that happen in broad daylight... ｜ 大白天的…怎么会撞见这么邪门的东西…
- Primary Antagonists ｜ 主要对手
- A special model of Aeonblight Drake that can engage in <color=#FFE14BFF>ground</color> and <color=#FFE14BFF>aerial</color> combat.\nThe Aeonblight Drake (Heavy Assault Pack) will periodically unleash dangerous <color=#FFE14BFF>Energy Surges</color> that will increase its Elemental RES based on the primary Elemental DMG type it has taken at this time. Each time it unleashes an Energy Surge, it will remove any other active Elemental RES effects.\nWhen it is in its aerial state, it will gain the protection of a <color=#FFE14BFF>Ward</color>, but the various <color=#FFE14BFF>cores</color> all over its body will be exposed. <color=#FFE14BFF>Hit those cores</color> to destroy the shield. After the shield is destroyed, the Aeonblight Drake (Heavy Assault Pack) will fall to the earth and be immobilized. ｜ 特殊型号的兆载永劫龙兽，可以在<color=#FFE14BFF>地面</color>与<color=#FFE14BFF>升空状态</color>下进行攻击。\n重武装兆载永劫龙兽在战斗中会周期性释放危险的<color=#FFE14BFF>能量洪流</color>，并根据此前受到伤害的主要元素类型，提高对应的元素抗性。每次施放能量洪流，都将清除已有的其他元素抗性提升效果。\n进入升空状态后，将受到<color=#FFE14BFF>护罩</color>庇护，但身体诸多部位的<color=#FFE14BFF>核心</color>会暴露出来。通过<color=#FFE14BFF>命中核心</color>的方式，可以破坏其护盾。护盾被破坏后，重武装兆载永劫龙兽将坠落至地面并瘫痪。
- Even prior to you dancing the blade dance, your aura is already blindingly powerful. I cannot imagine how intimidating you will be after defeating these enemies! ｜ 在开始剑舞之前，你们的气势就在不断攀升，那战胜敌人后，会有多强的威压，我完全无法想象！
- Hmm, this taste... well, it doesn't seem to taste like a Liyue or Inazuma dish. The taste is really new to me... ｜ 唔，这种味道…好、好像不是璃月的菜，也不是稻妻的菜，味道还真是新鲜…
- We're finally here! So, this is your home, Mualani! Paimon can't wait to have a look around! ｜ 终于到啦！这里就是玛拉妮的家，「流泉之众」吧，让我看看——
- No, not at all. I set all my camps up away from snake lairs precisely so that we could stay out of trouble... ｜ 不会的，不会的，我选的那几处营地都特意避开了蛇的聚集地，免得惹上什么麻烦…
- Turner ｜ 特纳
- Wow, smells great! Don't mind if I do! ｜ 哇，太香了！那我就不客气啦！
- A powerful tremor sweeps through the Night Kingdom. You must leave this place, and quickly... ｜ 一阵强烈的震颤席卷夜神之国，必须要快点从这里离开了…
- It was no big deal! Just a little bit of DIY that I picked up years ago. I've forgotten most of it, actually. ｜ 哎呀，一点点小手艺，不值一提，很多年前学的，我都忘得差不多了。
- "Beret Society" Member ｜ 「檐帽会」成员
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- We're not here for a free lunch. ｜ 无功不受禄。
- Hmm... Paimon feels like something should happen right about now... ｜ 唔…总感觉接下来这里应该会发生什么事情…

- That nasty man's about to hurt poor Jilliana! We gotta help her! ｜ 那家伙想对吉丽安娜小姐做什么！我们快去帮帮她吧！

- Yeah! It will work! Big fish, big fish, you must be good and bite the bait! I'm counting on you! ｜ 嗯！会成功的！大鱼大鱼，你一定要乖乖上钩呀！拜托你了！
- Pensive Hilichurl ｜ 思索的丘丘人
- Between Paimon and Kichiboushi, the Sweet Madame stands as much chance as a twig in a whirlwind. ｜ 派蒙与吉法师风卷残云般地吃完了甜甜花酿鸡。
- We've had to abandon our homes and chase the dying light of day. Maybe the only time we'll see the dawn again is in our dreams. ｜ 我们不得不放弃家园，追寻最后一丝生存的曙光，或许我们只能在梦中见到明日的黎明。
- Confirm Selection ｜ 确认选择

- Ah, I see... I almost forgot. I did lend her a hand earlier. In fact, our tribe's stage is nearby. ｜ 原来是这样…差点忘了，之前我确实帮了她一把，「回声之子」的考核关卡刚好也在这附近。

- Alright, fine. Same rules as before — if you want the truth, you'll have to use your wits to earn it! ｜ 那干脆这样，还是之前的规矩，用你们的智慧来换！
- Don't worry, I haven't forgotten my promise. But first, I have to drop by the Ministry of Civil Affairs and close this case. ｜ 放心吧，我记得我们的约定。不过现在我得去一趟总务司，给烟花案收尾。
- *snore* *snore* ｜ 呼呼…呼呼…
- This should be the place... That guy looks official. Let's go ask him. ｜ 应该就是这里了，那个人好像是管事的，我们去问问吧。
- ...Unfortunately, I never knew my mother. ｜ …很遗憾，我不知道我的母亲是谁。

- Aaaah!!! ｜ 呜哇！
- Yes, indeed. Gifts! Precious gifts! ｜ 嗯，没错哦。礼物，珍贵的礼物！
- If I had a brother too, I might not have turned out this way. ｜ 如果我也有哥哥，也许我就不会是现在这样。
- Alright, thank you for sticking with me this whole time. Please have these! ｜ 对了，谢谢你陪我到现在，这些东西给你！
- How am I going to know? I'm not a member of the Fontaine Research Institute. Anomalies have already occurred, so it has to be hazardous to the environment! ｜ 我怎么知道？我又不是枫丹科学院的人。反正都产生异象了，肯定对环境有害吧！
- Mani nini Biaodomu. ｜ mani nini Biaodomu.
- Goodbye, may the wind bless you. ｜ 再见，愿风为你带来好运。
- We... We didn't get eaten by the dragon? ｜ 我们…我们没被龙吃掉？
- Maybe there's a huge trove of treasure. ｜ 说不定还有超级大宝藏。

- Hi! Are you here to try Mondstadt's famous wine too? ｜ 哦！你也是来品尝蒙德著名的好酒吗？

- It is said that the origin of the Watatsumi people is Enkanomiya, deep in the ocean depths beneath Watatsumi Island. ｜ 传说海祇人的起源是海祇岛地底海渊的「渊下宫」。

- Okay, okay... ｜ 好啦…
- *sigh* If you ask me, though, I think he changed enough over the years as it is. I didn't recognize him at first. ｜ 唉，不过要我说，他本人就和过去差别够大了。一开始我都没认出来是他呢。

- All Aranara have returned to Vanarana for the celebration of Festival Utsava, like birds returning to their nests. ｜ 兰那罗都回到桓那兰那，庆祝无忧节，像归巢的鸟。
- Never mind, what's done is done. It's really my own fault for getting in too deep, hehe. ｜ 事到如今，别说这些了。要怪就怪我主动来凑这个热闹吧，呵呵。
- Just kidding, sorry about that. ｜ 开玩笑的。抱歉。

- And because of that one day, we eventually went on to fall in love. We studied, conducted research, and made breakthroughs together. ｜ 就是这么简单的原因，我们后来坠入了爱河，一起学习，一起研究，一起进步。

- We may all be desert-dwellers, but there's one thing that I understand better than you. The resurrection of King Deshret will only result in war... and war serves no one. ｜ 同为沙漠子民，我比你们更懂得一个道理，那就是赤王即便复活也只会带来战争…没有人喜欢战争。

- Albedo can lend great support to those in his party. His Elemental Skill creates a Solar Isotoma on the ground in front of him. Hold the skill button to designate its location. When a character stands at the locus of the Solar Isotoma, a crystallized platform will lift them upwards.\nWhen attacking opponents within the Solar Isotoma field, Transient Blossoms come into being before exploding, dealing AoE Geo DMG.\nAlbedo's Elemental Burst deals AoE Geo DMG in the area in front of him. If a Solar Isotoma zone is nearby, his Elemental Burst will generate Fatal Blossoms within its perimeter that will attack opponents by exploding.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 阿贝多可以为队友提供强力的支援。他的元素战技会在地面造出「阳华」，长按可以指定阳华创生的位置。当角色站在阳华上时，会有晶台将角色抬升。\n角色在阳华领域内攻击敌人时，会伴随「刹那之花」的创生与引爆。这会对敌人造成岩元素范围伤害。\n阿贝多的元素爆发会在前方造成岩元素范围伤害。如果附近存在阳华领域，元素爆发会在其内生成造物「生灭之花」并引爆来攻击敌人。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

- Wait, so if you adjust those racks to the correct positions, the water will part to reveal the real training grounds beneath — a grand hall several hundred meters deep... or something like that? ｜ 真正的训练场其实藏在水下，要是把这些木架调整到正确的位置，水面就会分开，露出几百米深的大厅…之类的？

- B—By accident!? ｜ 弄、弄坏了？！

- A sizable amount of Fairbrew Jelly, representing the base capital used in setting up your shop.\nAttracting customers and increasing earnings — these two are the key goals of all shopkeepers. As such, you must plan out your spending and increase the attractiveness of your shop. ｜ 数额有限的「佳酿晶冻」，是义卖活动中投入店铺经营的基本资金。\n吸引顾客和扩大营收，这两件事是每个店主的目标，为此，有必要精准地规划资金，增强店铺的吸引力
- An elegant folding screen that is made from the cores of somewhat-older Sandbearer Wood. The scarlet-tinted surface has a light fragrance. The fabric of the screen itself is satin-soft and splendidly embroidered with clusters of golden flowers, presenting the right path to riches — that is to say that all goods, whether in appearance or substance, must be as perfect as pure gold. This is a principle that Liyue's merchants have followed since the very beginning. ｜ 雅隽的屏风，以树龄偏老的「却砂木」芯材制成，朱红漆面带着一股淡雅的馨香。屏面的织物如绸缎般柔顺，绘有锦绣的金色花簇，象征着通往富贵的正道——商品的外在卖相和内在品质都应如真金般完美。这也是璃月的商人们长期遵循的原则。

- We should steady our hearts as well. ｜ 我们也要抱着平常心。
- #Let's try playing the Ancient Zither here, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，在这里弹琴试试吧。
- You think this is a game or something? If you're not serious about buying, quit wasting my time. I should be moving on to my next location by now, not stuck here arguing with you... ｜ 你们就是来消遣我的吧？不想买就别在这儿胡搅蛮缠了。吵吵闹闹的，都来不及换地方了…
- Thanks for the compliment. ｜ 谢谢夸奖。
- A Huge Shell! ｜ 巨大的贝壳！

- Hmm... Captain Kaeya would probably appear cordial and sincere as a means to convince his subject to lower their guard, would he not? ｜ 嗯…凯亚队长，还会用亲切的态度，让对方放下戒心？

- A small animal with a big, fluffy tail that is often seen in the wilderness.\nSquirrels are the most adept rodents at gathering and storing food, with a special liking for pinecones. \nTo some squirrels, Tubby's body looks like the blue canopy of a tree, causing them to try to burrow in her feathers, giving her a really good tickle in the process. ｜ 大尾巴的松鼠，荒野中常见的小动物。\n最善于囤积食粮的小小鼠类，尤其偏好松树的种实。\n在一些松鼠的眼中，阿圆蓬松的身体就像是蓝色的树冠，它们有时会钻进阿圆的羽毛中，让阿圆奇痒难耐，狂笑不止。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技

- I'm not worried, it's too early to make a verdict yet. I still have faith in the Homayanis. ｜ 没事，我相信老爷和小姐，现在做判断还为时尚早。
- Ah, you must be Charlotte? Welcome, welcome... Please, just call me Mona. Gosh, this is a long way to come from Fontaine. I hope it wasn't too much trouble... ｜ 夏洛蒂小姐是吧？欢迎欢迎，叫我莫娜就好。真是辛苦你大老远从枫丹过来了。

- Don't... Don't you lie to me just because I'm old! I clearly saw... Uh, when was that again? ｜ 你…你不能看我年纪大就骗我啊，我明明见到了…呃，什么时候来着？

- place into the Medicine Jar ｜ 置入药罐
- Sucrose and I agreed to present the wine ingredient to you together. But when she heard that Razor will be showing up, she insisted that she won't spend a moment longer here than she has to. ｜ 是这样的，我和砂糖小姐说好要一起把酿酒材料交给你们，可她一听说雷泽也要来，说什么都不肯留在这里。
- Seems there's nothing else we can do. ｜ 没办法了。
- Each time an enemy's shield is destroyed, the Support Level will increase. ｜ 每次破坏敌人的护罩时，支持率都将会上升。
- Anyway, thanks for bringing the letter back to me. You're sweating all over — here, have a drink on me. ｜ 谢谢你帮我把信带回来。看你这一身汗，来，喝点东西吧。
- The duration of the Ice Lance created by <color=#FFD780FF>Rites of Termination</color> is increased by 4s. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>终命的圣礼</color>创造的冰枪持续时间延长4秒。
- Wicked Dragon ｜ 恶龙
- A big, luxurious flower that can hide loaded dice. ｜ 华丽的大花朵，其中能藏得下自己事前准备好的骰子。
- What's wrong? ｜ 怎么了？
- Thank you. You've given us plenty to work with. ｜ 谢谢，我们了解得已经足够多了。
- E—Everything I did was for the "Supreme Delicacy"... ｜ 那、那都是为了「至上珍馐」…
- That's very simple as well. You just need to shift the "tower" from this pole to another pole. ｜ 也很简单——只要把这根杆上的「塔」，完整地移动到另一根上就可以。
- You're awake! Morning! ｜ 你醒了，早上好啊。
- I won! Wait here, I'll go buy us some drinks to celebrate — what do you want? ｜ 我赢啦！我等下去买两杯饮料庆祝一下，你要什么口味的？
- I'll think of a social activity that you would find easier to accept. ｜ 我来想一些甘雨接受程度高的项目。
- About the three towers... ｜ 关于三座塔…
- Your music brings out a different feeling in me now that my state of mind has changed. ｜ 此刻心境不同，音乐带来的体悟也有所不同了。
- Here I am. The coffee beans are in here too? ｜ 来了来了，咖啡豆也打包进去了吗？
- Why don't you just talk to him about it? ｜ 为什么不能好好说呢？
- That should be enough tables and chairs for everybody. ｜ 这就行了，差不多够用了。
- The journey will end, but the memories will remain. ｜ 一段旅途总会结束，但回忆不会。
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Dance of Resolute Will" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「深念锐意旋步舞」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- I'm Mualani. Just call me by my name. ｜ 我是玛拉妮，你直接用名字称呼我就可以。
- A rough-and-ready laurel wreath that seems as precious as a king's golden crown. ｜ 粗略编成的草环。对一些人而言，就像王者的金冠一样贵重吧。
- Little berry, come to my bowl... ｜ 小树莓，进我碗…
- #{F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Honorary Knight! Paimon! ｜ #荣誉骑士{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}和小派蒙！
